programme.title: Expedition Unknown: The Lost Tomb of Attila the Hun
programme.desc: Josh travels to Hungary to join three separate archeological teams looking for the lost tomb of Attila the Hun. Legends and ancient texts lead the search from the bottom of the Danube to the mountain forests just outside of Budapest.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Cracking the D.B. Cooper Case

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Africa's Cursed Lake of Gold
programme.desc: Josh journeys to the wilds of Namibia to embark on a treacherously deep dive in Lake Otjikoto for a long lost World War I treasure.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Chasing the Fortune of Sir Francis Drake
programme.desc: Josh Gates searches land and sea for the lost fortune of legendary pirate, Sir Francis Drake. Joining treasure hunters and maritime archaeologists, Josh hunts for a lost cache of Spanish gold and the remains of Drake himself.

programme.title: Bermuda Triangle Exposed
programme.desc: Examine what's beneath the surface of the Bermuda Triangle's 440,000 square miles of ocean. The Triangle's freak waves, magnetic anomalies and giant whirlpools have been blamed for mysterious disappearances for decades.

programme.title: Destroyed in Seconds
programme.desc: A racecar driver loses control; a propane gas explosion forces hundreds to flee; a bi-plane crashes into a lake.

programme.title: Destroyed in Seconds
programme.desc: Flames devastate an office building; a construction crane topples.

programme.title: Destroyed in Seconds

programme.title: Destroyed in Seconds

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Hidden History
programme.desc: The crew saves an Ohio barn built with incredible craftsmanship and Mark scouts another barn that turns out to be a keeper. Later, he visits a massive timber-frame barn that was perfectly restored on its original site and converted into a restaurant.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Barnwood Gold Mine

programme.desc: Doug's so busy planning his Super Bowl party that he forgets about Carrie's work problems.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: Going Overboard/ Walk Don't Run

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Sneaking Number Twos, Going Number One
programme.desc: Find out why the jokers love filming at the grocery store, how many pencils were purchased for put-pocketing and why Sal's pee punishment was twice as terrible as it looked.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Car Sick
programme.desc: Find out what celebrity Sal wrote fan letters to as a kid, which grocery game is Murr's favourite, how the guys found sloppy Joe and who helped Q's first jeep punishment a milky mess.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Marathon Man
programme.desc: Find out which joker has pet parakeets, why the crew had to work in a truck down the block while filming at a bagel shop and who got to sound the start horn for Murr's race across the Brooklyn Bridge.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: No Good Deed
programme.desc: Find out what after-school activity Joe's mom forbid him from doing, why filming nearly halted during the jack asses challenge and what last minute idea made it into Sal and Joe's charity funds punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Out of TP
programme.desc: Find out why so many early-season challenges happened in a mall, how the team hid the cameras, and what Sal said that became an instant classic. Plus, what the crew considers to be one of the first iconic moments of the show.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Pulling the Rug
programme.desc: Find out where Joe originally wanted to play hide n' seek, what Q's favourite dessert is, and what the crew was most afraid of during Murr's wig-pulling punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Starfart Macchiato
programme.desc: Find out what game the Jokers have played five times throughout the show's history, and how the crew got poison ivy. Plus, learn what game the Jokers played that had them asking for extra turns.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Running of the Bullies
programme.desc: Find out which Joker's waiter experience made meal or no meal a breeze, why there was a white noise machine needed during dust bunnies and who issued a siren warning right after Sal's pool punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Take Me Out at the Ballgame
programme.desc: The guys get drenched at a water park, and tonight's loser strikes out while jockeying for a ball from Mets pitcher Noah Syndergaard.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Guilty as Charged
programme.desc: Murr, Sal, Joe and Q enlist shoppers to help them avoid a rogue security guard, and tonight's big loser faces the wrath of a crowd of rockers.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Indecent Proposal
programme.desc: Sal, Murr, Joe and Q don absurd disguises to trick unsuspecting receptionists, then try to convince strangers to sign off on some unusual emails. Plus, the big loser turns a harmless dance class into a dance with danger.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Turning the Tables
programme.desc: Sal, Joe, Murr and Q take a spin in a motorized chair hoping the kindness of strangers will keep them on track. Tonight's big loser walks away bruised and battered when he's forced to clear some tables in an unusual way.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Lords of the Ring
programme.desc: The guys skirt the law while posing as receptionists, then go fishing at an unlikely locale. And the heat is on tonight's big losers as they try to give one unlucky customer the deal of a lifetime.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: No Child Left Behind
programme.desc: The guys pitch toys that should be kept away from tots, face off at a market, and see sports at the mall. The big loser sticks his nose where it doesn't belong.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins a Sitcom
programme.desc: Adam tackles classic television stereotypes, from the racism behind public pools, to the 'model minority' myth of Asian Americans, to the on-screen toxic masculinity that's masking the problems young men face today.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins Nature
programme.desc: Adam digs up the dirt on nature, revealing that Mount Everest is a frozen pile of poop, natural disasters are actually man-made, and there is no such thing as untouched wilderness.

programme.title: The Misery Index: How Did It Get in There?
programme.desc: Learn about the dumbest way to break up with someone and the gross dream that Sal needs to 'soldier forward' from. Then, a pantless performer and a vertical face planter go all out to be masters of misery.

programme.title: The Misery Index: He's Crushing His Man Cave Game
programme.desc: The Tenderloins witness the most embarrassing way to ruin a wedding.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dover and Out
programme.desc: The guys survey employees with odd questions, and tonight's loser unveils a mural in a small town whose residents react with big city rage.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Party Crasher
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Q and Murr dodge shakedowns with the help of some strangers, and tonight's loser has a run-in at a party that leaves him down for the count.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Walking Dread
programme.desc: The guys take time to smell the roses, then pair up to double dip at the mall. Tonight's loser battles an undead enemy to save his family.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: X Man
programme.desc: The guys compete in their first four-way challenge. Later, see what happens when they try to lead a kid's art class, and which loser fails so badly that he's hit with an on-the-spot punishment that leaves him seeing red.

programme.title: Hack My Life: To Tell a Lie
programme.desc: Brooke and Kevin meet their toughest challenge yet when they use hacks to game a polygraph test, and Kevin learns how to defend himself with a smartphone.

programme.title: Hack My Life: Awww Craps

programme.title: Hack My Life: Addicted to Hacks

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: The Crazy Bitch Gazette
programme.desc: Charlie's past comes back to bite him when his girlfriend decides that his stalker, Rose, is just too much to handle.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Springtime on a Stick
programme.desc: Charlie and Alan try to set Evelyn up with Russell, the pharmacist.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: A Good Time in Central Africa
programme.desc: When Berta takes a couple of days off, Charlie falls for her replacement. Meanwhile, Alan believes he's being stalked by Lyndsey's ex-husband.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Ow, Ow, Don't Stop
programme.desc: Charlie goes on a spending spree for his old fling, Courtney, who shows up after three years in prison for conning him out of money.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Dead From the Waist Down
programme.desc: Alan gets creative when he discovers that he can't afford to buy Lyndsey a nice birthday present.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Chocolate Diddlers or My Puppy's Dead
programme.desc: Charlie falls into a depression after his break-up with Courtney and goes to see a psychiatrist.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Skunk, Dog Crap and Ketchup

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Lookin' for Japanese Subs
programme.desc: Charlie's obsession with the newly 'married' Rose leads him to stalk her. Meanwhile, Alan grows concerned when Jake and Eldridge start videotaping stupid and extremely dangerous stunts.

programme.desc: While Charlie and Rose carry on their 'affair,' Alan's chiropractic business turns into a Ponzi scheme.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Nice to Meet You, Walden Schmidt

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: A Decent Proposal

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: How I Hate Your Mother

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: White Like Me
programme.desc: Barb's profile in a business journal brings in new clientele.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: Snakes on a Date

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: Everyone Says I Love You Except Ritchie
programme.desc: When Ritchie stops telling Christine he loves her, she asks Richard to have a baby with her so she can have a new child to love her, the way Ritchie once did.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: Tie Me Up, Don't Tie Me Down

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Never Yell Fire in a Crowded Retirement Home

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Never Yell Fire in a Crowded Retirement Home

programme.desc: Blanche meets a man at the library and only after they make a date does she realize he's in a wheelchair. Meanwhile, Rose wants to keep one of the puppies from Dreyfuss's litter despite Blanche's feelings.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Ebbtide's Revenge
programme.desc: Dorothy must give the eulogy at her brother (a cross dresser), Phil's funeral. Meanwhile, a feud between Sophia and Phil's widow reaches a peak leading Sophia to reveal her hidden feelings about her son's alternative lifestyle.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Bloom Is Off the Rose
programme.desc: Rose wants more adventure in her relationship with Miles, so she signs them up for sky diving lessons. Meanwhile, Blanche's relationship with an abusive man causes Dorothy to speak her feelings.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Sister of the Bride

programme.title: The Golden Girls: There Goes the Bride

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Hey Look Me Over
programme.desc: The discovery of a photo of Blanche in bed with Rose's husband threatens their friendship.

programme.desc: Craig was couch surfing and living paycheck to paycheck when he was given the second chance of a lifetime a million-dollar prize for winning a Hoosier Lottery second-chance drawing. He can now buy the land he's wanted in rural Indiana.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home: Tallahassee Dream Team
programme.desc: Shane buys scratchers almost every day, and luckily for him and his partner, Crystal, his habit paid off to the tune of $1 million! Now they're able to buy their first house in Tallahassee, Florida.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home: Milk Money
programme.desc: Fran stopped by the grocery store for milk and came home a multi-millionaire from a lottery win. Now, she and her partner Sharon are planning to retire and want to find their dream home in Suffield, Connecticut.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home: Bliss in the 'burbs
programme.desc: City boy Calvin is willing to move to the suburbs for his new bride, Denise, but that compromise just got a little easier after a quick pick Illinois lottery ticket won them a whopping $4.75 million.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home: Follow Me to Tennessee
programme.desc: A couple wins a million dollars, but instead of buying their own dream home, they want to buy one for their son that they can live in, too.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home: Payday in V-A
programme.desc: An attorney and single father of a three-year-old son scored $1 million on the mega millions. Now he's ready to move out of his rental and find the perfect father-son forever home in beautiful Richmond, Virginia.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home: A Place on Pamlico Sound
programme.desc: After scratching her way to a million-dollar win, a woman and her husband upsize their retirement plans to include a place on the shores of Pamlico Sound in North Carolina.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home: Old Charm for Newlyweds
programme.desc: When Laura and John got engaged, they got a surprise early wedding gift in the form of a $1 million win on a scratch card. Now they are looking for a home with some old-fashioned charm and space to start a family in Massachusetts.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home: Luck of the Irish
programme.desc: Bill and Eric hit the jackpot on the St. Patrick's Day lottery and couldn't believe their good luck. Now, the happy couple and their twins need help finding a larger family home on Chicago's classy North Shore.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home: The House Always Wins
programme.desc: A professional poker player with a total winning pot of $4 million is ready to go 'all in' on a huge family home along Philadelphia's Main Line area.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home: A Hero's Reward
programme.desc: After lady luck rewards a retired firefighter for a lifetime of service with a big win, dream home hunter David Bromstad helps him search for the perfect bachelor pad in the Lakeland region of Florida.

programme.title: Good Bones: Client Renovation Rescue
programme.desc: Mina and Karen take on a renovation project for an optimistic client who bought a duplex with intentions of renovating it himself.

programme.title: Good Bones: The Half Million Dollar House
programme.desc: Mina and Karen have purchased their most expensive house to date, in the most desirable neighborhood in downtown Indianapolis. The size of the house and its great location could mean a selling price close to $500,000 if they play their cards right.

programme.title: Good Bones: Big Money in Fountain Square
programme.desc: Mina and Karen take on a massive, partially-constructed house that was abandoned by investors. Mina decides to take a risk with her own money, which could be the move that sells the house or leaves them over budget.

programme.title: Ghost Adventures: Haunted Harvey House

programme.title: Planet Earth: Blue Planet II: The Deep

programme.desc: Corals build themselves homes of limestone in the warm, clear, shallow seas of the tropics. Their reefs occupy less than one tenth of one per cent of the ocean floor, yet they are home to a quarter of all known marine species.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Blue Planet II: Big Blue

programme.desc: A student, who leads a double life as a prostitute, begins a relationship with a drifter.

programme.title: City Confidential: Atlantic City
programme.desc: This East Coast gambling mecca is not without its mob problems.

programme.title: City Confidential: Bad News in Battle Creek
programme.desc: Residents of a peaceful Michigan city are shocked when a local TV anchorwoman is murdered.

programme.title: City Confidential: Carlsbad: Danger in the Desert
programme.desc: Johnny Volpato, a popular politician and pharmacist, was accused of shooting his wife.

programme.title: Casanova Killers: A Wolf in Sheep's Clothing
programme.desc: A woman is found dead and her boyfriend tries to help police catch the killer.

programme.title: Casanova Killers: Where There's Smoke
programme.desc: Up and coming lawyer Michael Fletcher can barely keep it together as he calls police to his suburban Detroit home. Upon arrival, officers find Fletcher's wife, Leann, dead from an apparent accidental self-inflicted gunshot wound.

programme.title: Casanova Killers: Lethal Lovers
programme.desc: In Huntington Beach two well respected doctors, Carolyn and Ken Stahl, are found shot to death on the side of a highway. As police unravel this baffling case they find the power couple had a less than perfect marriage.

programme.title: Jacked: Auto Theft Task Force: I Don't Think I Can Make It in Jail
programme.desc: The Task Force acquires a new piece of equipment and finds it to be very helpful. Later, the A.T.T.F helps the Newark police catch an armed robbery vehicle.

programme.title: Jacked: Auto Theft Task Force: Fastest Feet in the Fleet
programme.desc: The Unit has their busiest night; a break is taken to see who is the fastest in the unit.

programme.title: Dead Silent: Fatal Friendship
programme.desc: When recent high school graduate Stephanie Neiman gives her friend Summer Hair a ride in small town Oklahoma, what starts out as a favor quickly becomes a struggle to survive.

programme.title: Dead Silent: Taken for a Ride
programme.desc: Reeling from a recent breakup, 23 year-old Jacey McWilliams is down in the dumps until she finds herself smitten with a hot, new man. But just when it looks like they're about to take their relationship to the next level, it runs horrifically off course.

programme.title: Dead Silent: Get Out
programme.desc: Young love leads fifteen-year old high school standout Jessica Keen down an increasingly rebellious path that culminates in a night of grave and unfathomable terror in rural Madison County, Ohio.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: My Father, The Serial Killer
programme.desc: Horror strikes a small Wisconsin town in 1980 after a young couple disappears and is later discovered in a field. Dubbed the Sweetheart Murders, it's almost 40 years before a woman comes forward saying her family holds the key to unlocking the case.

programme.title: Who Was the Preppy Killer?
programme.desc: The press seizes on 20-year-old prep school heartthrob Robert Chambers provocative claim that his then girlfriend 18-year-old Jennifer Levin was strangled to death accidentally during rough sex in Central Park.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID Investigates: Evil in Eden
programme.desc: Two brothers grow up in the shadow of Yosemite National Park. One, a victim of crime, becomes a national hero. The other, in the shadows, harbours feelings of rage that erupt into murderous violence and make him famous for a darker reason.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: The Killer Clown?
programme.desc: A bizarre murder shocks a wealthy community when a person dressed like a clown guns down a woman at her front door. Suspicion falls on the victim's husband and his alleged girlfriend, but it would take over twenty years until an arrest is finally made.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID Investigates: Evil in Eden
programme.desc: Two brothers grow up in the shadow of Yosemite National Park. One, a victim of crime, becomes a national hero. The other, in the shadows, harbours feelings of rage that erupt into murderous violence and make him famous for a darker reason.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: The Killer Clown?
programme.desc: A bizarre murder shocks a wealthy community when a person dressed like a clown guns down a woman at her front door. Suspicion falls on the victim's husband and his alleged girlfriend, but it would take over twenty years until an arrest is finally made.

programme.title: Who Was the Preppy Killer?
programme.desc: The press seizes on 20-year-old prep school heartthrob Robert Chambers provocative claim that his then girlfriend 18-year-old Jennifer Levin was strangled to death accidentally during rough sex in Central Park.

programme.title: Dark Minds: The I-70 Killer
programme.desc: In the spring of 1992 a serial killer cut a swath through the Mid West. Six victims across three states, shot execution style. The victims all worked in small stores just blocks from the I-70. Why the freeway? Why did he start, and what made him stop?

programme.title: Dark Minds: Road Paved in Murder
programme.desc: In Denver, CO, a serial killer is posing the naked bodies of young women by highways outside the city. At least four victims were left this way and there may be more. The Dark Minds team is looking for connections and clues in the Aurora County Murders.

programme.title: Deadline: Crime With Tamron Hall: New Mexico Desert Killings
programme.desc: When a young woman vanishes from a New Mexico convenience store, two detectives discover tracks in the dirt that may lead them to answers. After a second woman disappears, it's a race against time to stop a potential serial killer.

programme.title: Deadline: Crime With Tamron Hall: Dancing With the Devil
programme.desc: A missing cheerleader. A seemingly unrelated roadside fire. As two cases converge, police juggle numerous suspects and motives, until a cryptic surveillance video brings the investigation to a shocking conclusion of betrayal, devotion, and murder.

programme.title: Deadline: Crime With Tamron Hall: Vanishing On I-95
programme.desc: A woman driving solo to visit a friend on Florida's I-95 mysteriously vanishes. Her divorce leads police one way, but when her body is found it suggests something horribly different. Another woman who reads about the case has a hunch she knows the killer.

programme.title: The Shadows of Death: The Manifesto
programme.desc: When Pastor Remington is gunned down in broad daylight at his church in Coeur d'Alene, Idaho, police launch a massive manhunt to stop the shooter before he strikes again. Across town, the Odom family fear their own missing son is in grave danger.

programme.title: The Shadows of Death: The Pledge
programme.desc: Debbie Smith receives the call every mother dreads: her son, Matthew, has unexpectedly died at college. As police investigate the circumstances of his death, they discover it was more than an accident, and that those closest to him may be to blame.

programme.title: The Shadows of Death: The Oath
programme.desc: In search of a better life, the Shahanazari family immigrated from Iran to Glendale, California. But when the youngest son, Chris, is murdered in a violent home invasion, his older brother Sevan fears he himself is to blame.

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: Open Door Policy
programme.desc: The brutal murder of Mike and Terri Greene hits close to home in Grand Ledge, Michigan. The couple was beloved by everyone in the small town and Mike was a retired police officer. Evidence of a personal grudge, but could the motive so clear cut?

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: Tragedy Comes in Pairs
programme.desc: Lightning strikes twice in the desert town of Socorro, New Mexico, when Crystal Houston is found murdered just 14 months after her older sister, Stephanie, is killed in a suspicious accident.

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: Mommy, Please Come Home
programme.desc: The tiny town of Glendive, Montana is paralyzed with fear when mother of four Susan Casey vanishes. The ensuing investigation leaves everyone to wonder if one of Susan's former flames is harboring a sinister secret - or if someone else is stalking her.

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: Coal Miner's Slaughter
programme.desc: A respected businesswoman in the placid town of Madisonville, KY is found bludgeoned and stabbed to death in her home.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Fall of France
programme.desc: First-hand accounts of the incredible sacrifices and momentous feats endured by the Allies alongside the devastating consequences of the German capture of France.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Battle of Britain
programme.desc: The British begin to face the Germans over the buildings of London and other British towns, and brave young pilots give their all for the Ally cause.

programme.title: Nazi Death Squads: Mass Graves
programme.desc: The armies of the Third Reich invaded the USSR in 1941. Mobile commandos, the Einsatzgruppen, were following their advance to Stalingrad with the mission of eliminating all Jews on the conquered territories.

programme.title: Nazi Death Squads: Judenfrei
programme.desc: After the EZG's intervention, Romania, Bulgaria, Hungary and the Baltic states are declared "Judenfrei": free of Jews.

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Khe Sanh: Marines Under Siege
programme.desc: Six thousand outnumbered marines fight for survival against a vast, highly trained Communist army in a bloody 77 day siege. It's a battle that will shape the course of the war in Vietnam.

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Kandahar: Against All Odds
programme.desc: 36 U.S Special Forces face a Taliban insurgence 5 times their size. Facing I.E.Ds , RPG's and vicious counter attacks, they fight for their lives to take the hill of Sperwan Ghar, as control of the hill is control of Kandahar.

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Fallujah: The Taking of Terror Central
programme.desc: Operation Phantom Fury was meant to be a 48 hour battle but insurgents, armed with IEDs and a stockpile of grenades, fought back. US forces faced one of the toughest urban conflicts since Vietnam as they tried to reclaim the city.

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Baghdad: Thunder Runs
programme.desc: In what would become one of the most brutal and decisive battles of the Iraq war, a battalion of tanks punches a hole right into the heart of Saddam Hussein's Baghdad in 2003. They are the first Mechanised force to enter a capitol city since WWII.

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Kandahar: Against All Odds

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Khe Sanh: Marines Under Siege
programme.desc: Six thousand outnumbered marines fight for survival against a vast, highly trained Communist army in a bloody 77 day siege. It's a battle that will shape the course of the war in Vietnam.

programme.title: Nazi Death Squads: Judenfrei
programme.desc: After the EZG's intervention, Romania, Bulgaria, Hungary and the Baltic states are declared "Judenfrei": free of Jews.

programme.title: Nazi Death Squads: Mass Graves
programme.desc: The armies of the Third Reich invaded the USSR in 1941. Mobile commandos, the Einsatzgruppen, were following their advance to Stalingrad with the mission of eliminating all Jews on the conquered territories.

programme.title: WWII's Greatest Raids: Strike From the Sky
programme.desc: British light infantry must crash land by glider in Northern France then take and hold two key bridges in the hands of a heavily armed enemy.

programme.title: WWII's Greatest Raids: Hitler's Last Bridge
programme.desc: A brave band of regular GI's are tasked with saving the last bridge and final gateway to the Third Reich. The bridge is bristling with German guns loaded with explosives. Worse, the enemy plan to destroy the bridge if the American unit assaults it.

programme.title: WWII's Greatest Raids: SAS vs. Rommel
programme.desc: The SAS launches a daring raid behind enemy lines on a German airfield in the Sahara Desert. If they succeed in destroying Rommel's supply planes, their action could turn the tide of war and allow the British to drive the Germans out of North Africa.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Eastern Front
programme.desc: The war reaches a critical turning point as Hitler expands the war to a second front. German soldiers endure the unrelenting climate of the Eastern Front, and face the full-force of angry Red Army fighters.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: D-Day and Liberation
programme.desc: Listen to the astonishing stories behind the liberation of France and hear the price many soldiers had to pay in order for the Allies to take France back from the Germans.

programme.title: Top Ten Warfare: Vessels
programme.desc: This episode ranks the most iconic vessels of warfare of the last century. Featuring the German U-Boat, the Nimitz Aircraft Carriers, and the world's most successful battleship, these vessels have changed the face of warfare.

programme.title: Top Ten Warfare: Weapons
programme.desc: The story of warfare in the modern age, from the legendary Spitfire to the stealth bombers of Iraq.

programme.title: Top Ten Warfare: Inventions
programme.desc: From the mass production of life-saving Penicillin and pioneering Plastic Surgery, to the development of the Internet and GPS, this episode uses rare archive footage and expert interviews to identify and rank the most influential inventions of warfare.

programme.title: Top Ten Warfare: Aircraft
programme.desc: Find out about aircraft important to conflicts in the 20th and 21st centuries.

programme.title: Top Ten Warfare: Battles
programme.desc: With incredible archive from the heart of the action, and interviews with world-leading historians, this action-packed episode counts down the most decisive battles of warfare that have been caught on camera.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Salvaging Items From an Apple Orchard into Repurposed Goods
programme.desc: The Black Dog Salvage crew head into the mountains to salvage different structures of an old apple orchard. Key finds include roof tin, apple picking ladders, and apple crates. Robert also helps Ted build a commissioned iron gate.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Salvaging Items From an Old Navy Ship in Norfolk, VA, Into Repurposed Goods
programme.desc: Mike, Robert, and the Black Dog Salvage crew salvage parts off a former navy ship, the USS Zuni/ USCG Tamaroa. Key finds include an officer's table, portholes, and wooden ship frames. At the warehouse, Mike builds a table from an airplane wing.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Clapp Farm Windmill
programme.desc: Mike, Robert and the rest of the team salvage an Aeromotor windmill in Liberty, North Carolina. They also pick through various barns on the property. Back in the woodshop, Mike uses salvaged barn wood and iron to build a floor lamp.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Cast Iron Storefront
programme.desc: Mike, Robert and the rest of the team salvage a cast iron storefront in Vicksburg, MS. Mike and Tay also work together to build a custom table for country music duo Thompson Square.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Vaughan Furniture Company
programme.desc: Mike and Ted struggle to salvage a heavy furniture press while Robert is slowed down by explosion-proof lights. Mike and Grayson build a chair with pieces from an old suitcase and Robert discovers a vintage TV and radio.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Byrd Log Cabin
programme.desc: The Salvage Dawgs team returns to a previously salvaged house to save its original log structure. Mike and Tay also learn how that wood is milled for a custom building project. Mike uses that same wood to build an end table for the property owner.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Fringer Cannery
programme.desc: Mike, Robert, and the crew salvage an old iron ore mine that was converted into a cannery in the 1930s. Main items include a curved I-beam, oversized pressure-cookers, and a canning carousel.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Country Store and Gas Station
programme.desc: The crew heads to Grottoes, Virginia, to salvage and demolish an old country store. Using materials from the project, Mike and Robert create a tribute bench for a veterans' retreat.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Carpenters Hall
programme.desc: The crew stays local and heads just down the street in Roanoke where they salvage a one-of-a-kind sign and pick through an old meeting hall. Later, Mike and Tay build a TV console out of old material.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Former United Methodist Church
programme.desc: The crew head to Laurel, Delaware to salvage what they can from a former Methodist church that fell victim to water damage. The team removes pews, a bronze bell, and a greenhouse skylight before heading back to the shop.

programme.title: Restored: 1940s Modern Ranch
programme.desc: Brett restores a 1941 modern ranch in Redlands, CA, for a couple who recently inherited the home from her grandfather.

programme.title: Restored: 1940s California Ranch Project
programme.desc: Brett is horrified when a local fire chief and his wife ask him to completely gut and restore their 1940s California Ranch. Brett sets out to show them they can have a kitchen with all the modern conveniences they desire.

programme.title: Restored: 1905 Queen Anne Victorian Restoration
programme.desc: One of Brett's old high school friends asks him to help restore her 1905 Queen Anne Victorian bungalow. She has many unfinished renovation projects but wants to finish them. She also wants to convert a bedroom into the office it was designed to be.

programme.title: Restored: 1900 Victorian Farmhouse
programme.desc: A couple seeks Brett's help restoring their big 1900 Victorian Farmhouse in time for their wedding. They're hoping he can design a rustic kitchen, update the laundry area and add light to the interior rooms closed off by past modifications.

programme.title: Good Eats: Strawberry Sky
programme.desc: Chef/Scientist Alton Brown shares tips on how to make the most of the strawberry season.

programme.title: Good Eats: Deep Space Slime
programme.desc: Chef/Scientist Alton Brown makes spooky, gooey gelatine molds that kids will love.

programme.title: Good Eats: Alton's Countdown to T-Day
programme.desc: Alton Brown takes one final shot at the biggest food holiday of the year.

programme.title: Iron Chef America: Garces Vs. Spence
programme.desc: Seattle Chef Carolynn Spence brings her Pacific Northwest cuisine into Kitchen Stadium to battle Iron Chef Jose Garces.

programme.title: Iron Chef America: Forgione vs. Cantrel
programme.desc: New York-based chef Nicolas Cantrel battles Iron Chef Marc Forgione.

programme.title: Iron Chef America: Symon/ Burrell vs. Cora/ Irvine
programme.desc: Symon and Cora are up against Anne Burrell and Robert Irvine in a battle of culinary masters.

programme.title: Iron Chef America: Thanksgiving: Past And Present
programme.desc: Iron Chef veteran and reigning Thanksgiving Battle victors Bobby Flay and Michael Symon are challenged by the new kids in Kitchen Stadium, Iron Chefs Geoffrey Zakarian and Alex Guarnaschelli, in this Thanksgiving battle.

programme.title: Iron Chef America: Morimoto vs. Cantu
programme.desc: Chef Masaharu Morimoto hopes to reign supreme following his battle with Chef Homaru Cantu.

programme.title: Iron Chef America: Zakarian vs. Schenker
programme.desc: Iron Chef Geoffrey Zakarian faces off against chef Jesse Schenker, chef and owner of Recette in New York. Judges are Julie White, Art Smith and Anya Fernald.

programme.title: Unique Eats: Nostalgic Noshes

programme.title: Unique Eats: Romantic Spots

programme.title: Unique Sweets: Chocolate
programme.desc: Concoctions that celebrate chocolate.

programme.title: Unique Sweets: Cute and Sweet
programme.desc: Today we visit three locations that pack big flavors in small servings. First stop is Cake Monkey Bakery in Los Angeles to try some of their mini layer cakes.

programme.title: Unique Sweets: Game Changers
programme.desc: Visit three of NYC's game changers, putting a new spin on old favorites. At Dominique Ansel Kitchen time is the secret ingredient.

programme.title: Unique Sweets: Deep Freeze
programme.desc: These frozen treats go far beyond vanilla, chocolate and strawberry scoots. In Honolulu, Shimazu Store pushes the boundaries of shave ice, a uniquely Hawaiian treat. In New York, Ice and Vice uses unconventional ingredients to create edgy desserts.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Key West
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern delights in the fun and funky flavors of Key West, Florida. From conch fritters, coconut pink shrimp and fried hogfish sandwiches to toasty Cubanos and quintessential Key lime pie, Key West is full of fresh eats and local ingredients.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Phnom Penh
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern discovers the complex flavors of Phnom Penh, Cambodia. Spicy grilled crab, cold and refreshing beef salad and herbaceous fish and noodle soup reflect a mission to preserve the uniqueness of Cambodian cuisine.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Panama City
programme.desc: Andrew digs in to Panama City's classic tastes inspired by the blended cultures that make up the capital city's population. From fried whole fish and plantains to citric ceviche and yucca fritters, the Latin flair of this city seasons every dish.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: San Antonio
programme.desc: Andrew showcases the Tex-Mex favorites of San Antonio, Texas, including puffy tacos and a giant chalupa burger. Other featured foods include slow-cooked brisket, melt-in-your-mouth barbacoa and marinated stuffed quail cooked over mesquite.

programme.title: Extreme Cake Makers: Cake Freedom
programme.desc: For her client's cake, detail master Suzanne creates a pair of legs that are made for walking. Molly has only one day to create four realistic and playful kitty cakes.

programme.title: Extreme Cake Makers: The Purr-Fect Birthday Cake
programme.desc: Extreme cake maker Molly Robbins is designing the purr-fect surprise for her best friend and cat lover, Liz.

programme.title: Crazy Cakes: Sea Creatures and Corvette Cakes
programme.desc: Young buccaneers on an Old World pirate ship are treated to a cake filled with treasure, and a group of car connoisseurs enjoys a replica cake that's ready to roll.

programme.title: Crazy Cakes: Fierce, Festive Cakes
programme.desc: One baker is excited to create a massive shark cake to celebrate Discovery's Shark Week, and a bride and groom are floored when their gorgeous wedding cake spins.

programme.title: Cupcake Wars: Jessica Alba: The Honest Company
programme.desc: Four talented cupcake bakers fight to win over special guest judge Jessica Alba, as they face off the chance to have their all-natural organic cupcakes at the centre of a party launching the new headquarters for her brand, The Honest Company.

programme.desc: This hard-hitting newscast, featuring stories from the worlds of politics and world affairs, focuses on the stories that matter most to America. Interviews with newsmakers offer insight into on-going debates.

programme.title: Strange Inheritance: John Brown's Shackles
programme.desc: Examining real-life stories of unconventional inheritances.

programme.title: Strange Inheritance: Little House, Big Mall
programme.desc: A woman refuses to sell her home to a developer, who builds a shopping mall around it. Hollywood takes notice when she wills it to the person you’d least expect.

programme.title: Strange Inheritance: Hollywood Dog Fight
programme.desc: A Los Angeles animal trainer inherits a dangerous dog and a California woman leaves her house to her parrot.

programme.title: Strange Inheritance: Black Swamp Baseball Card Find
programme.desc: Cousins inherit their great-grandfather’s house and discover hundreds of uncirculated 1909 baseball cards in the attic.

programme.title: Lou Dobbs Tonight

programme.desc: Alone in London, a talking bear is taken in by a kindly English family after his home in Peru is destroyed. While he searches for more permanent lodgings, he falls into the clutches of a nasty taxidermist.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Shorts: Easy Street
programme.desc: Pluto turns jealous after Goofy moves in and starts behaving like Mickey’s new dog.

programme.title: Movie: The Chronicles of Narnia: Prince Caspian
programme.desc: Four children help fight to restore a kingdom to its rightful heir.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Most Dangerous Game...Night!
programme.desc: When Louie’s quiet family game night goes wrong, the family deals with shrink rays, a secret civilization and an unhealthy competition.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Dangerous Chemistry of Gandra Dee!
programme.desc: With Huey and Webby’s help, Fenton woos a punk rock scientist, only to uncover her dangerous plans for Gizmoduck.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Where's Perry?
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb embark on an African safari vacation while their loyal pet platypus Perry stays back in Danville to handle a Dr. Doofenshmirtz emergency.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Where's Perry?
programme.desc: With Agent P nowhere in sight, Dr. Doofenshmirtz and Major Monogram square off against evil Carl who controls a set of Flynn-Fletcher robots to take over the OWCA, in one of the biggest battles yet.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Supersonic Sue
programme.desc: Big Hero 6 attempt to thwart a bank robbery and are defeated by Supersonic Sue, an old school roller-skating villain.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: El Fuego
programme.desc: Professional mech-wrestler El Fuego is intent on becoming the toughest fighter in San Fransokyo and decides he must beat the strongest challenger he can find, Baymax.

programme.title: Amphibia: Grubhog Day/ Hop Pop and Lock
programme.desc: During Grubhog Day, Sprig has to decide whether to uphold his responsibilities or have fun at the carnival. To impress Sylvia Sundew, Hop Pop asks Anne to teach him to dance.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Golden Armory of Cornelius Coot
programme.desc: Webby leads the kids in a race against the Beagles to find a secret treasure while hiding a secret of her own. Della is forced to teach Launchpad how to actually fly a plane.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Sock Opera
programme.desc: In an attempt to impress a local puppeteer, Mabel decides to put on a huge sock puppet rock opera, but her show goes awry when Dipper’s drive to uncover journal secrets leads to a supernatural disaster.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Society of the Blind Eye
programme.desc: The kids, along with Old Man McGucket's help, discover there is a secret society on Gravity Falls.

programme.title: Star Wars Resistance: The Engineer
programme.desc: Kaz and Neeku discover Nena, a Nikto engineer in need of assistance, who barely escaped a First Order attack.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Muira-Horror!
programme.desc: Hiro and Go Go accompany Krei to the woods to deal with Nedd Ludd, however they run into the monster of legend, the Hibagon, along the way.

programme.title: Polaris: Player Select: Royal Rumble
programme.desc: A compilation of top gaming videos from YouTube stars.

programme.title: Parker Plays
programme.desc: YouTube star Parker Coppins shares his hilarious gameplay commentary.

programme.title: DuckTales: Friendship Hates Magic!
programme.desc: Stuck as a shadow, Lena tries to protect Webby from her suspicious new friend Violet during a supernatural sleepover.

programme.title: DuckTales: A Nightmare on Killmotor Hill!
programme.desc: The kids are pulled into a world made of their wildest dreams. Unfortunately, Lena's worst nightmare comes true: Magica De Spell is back and coming to reclaim what's hers.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Inconveniencing
programme.desc: When Dipper tries to impress Wendy by acting older than he really is, he's invited to join a group of teenagers on a trek that leads to an old abandoned convenience store that could be haunted.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Hand That Rocks the Mabel
programme.desc: Dipper and Mabel discover their seemingly cherubic new neighbour, Lil' Gideon, happens to be the town's adored psychic. But when Dipper convinces Mabel to go on a date with Gideon to question his authenticity, she soon learns that his cuteness can fade.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Muira-Horror!
programme.desc: Hiro and Go Go accompany Krei to the woods to deal with Nedd Ludd, however they run into the monster of legend, the Hibagon, along the way.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Something Fluffy
programme.desc: When mysterious but adorable creatures called Mayoi suddenly appear in San Fransokyo, Hiro is convinced that they’re part of some nefarious plot by Liv Amara.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: City of Monsters
programme.desc: Karmi and Hiro team up to help treat someone with genetically engineered parasites.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: City of Monsters
programme.desc: Big Hero 6 must continue to fight off a city overrun with monsters.

programme.title: Beyblade Burst Turbo: Turbo Training! Xavier's Kingdom!
programme.desc: Aiger's training adventure starts now. His first stop is the kingdom ruled by his rival, Xavier Bogard. The young prince offers Aiger some intense training to help him overcome his self-doubt.

programme.title: Inazuma Eleven Ares: A Day Without Mister Yi
Movie: Pokémon: Arceus and the Jewel of Life
programme.desc: Arceus must be prevented from using his Judgement on the world.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania: The Series: Bat Flap Fever/ Thumb and Thumber
programme.desc: Mavis is horrified by her dad's new Mavy-Wavy fashion wings.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania: The Series: Gorytelling/ A Few Good Monsters
programme.desc: When Cornelius Shivers reveals that he's writing a book about the hotel, each member of the Dracula family hopes to outdo the others with their own story. After a family heirloom is destroyed, the children are considered the only suspects.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania: The Series: Great Eggspectations/ Hotel Pennsylvania
programme.desc: Mavis tries to prove she can care for a living creature by rescuing a 'bad egg.' The kids try to watch the last episode of their favourite show, Hotel Pennsylvania.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania: The Series: Enter the Nosepicker/ Hide and Shriek
programme.desc: Mavis accidentally lures a Nose Picker into the hotel. Later, Mavis finds her childhood toy, Demented Debbie, in the attic.

programme.desc: The guys head to the Top of the Rock for some awkward interactions, and tonight's big loser suits up or down for a run across the Brooklyn Bridge.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Running of the Bullies

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Roadside Sting

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Stray Bullets
programme.desc: In El Paso County, teal season has just begun. An injured hog needs help in Hardin County. Galveston County fishermen are not playing by the rules. A suspicious driver is searched in Chambers County. Turtle hatchlings are released on South Padre Island.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Deceived
programme.desc: Game wardens attempt to catch a running deer before it hurts itself. The wardens investigate an impersonation case in which a man claims to be one of their own. While patrolling Lake Tawakoni, Richards comes across a suspicious group.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Midnight Manhunt
programme.desc: A badly injured tortoise needs an innovative procedure and an eagle's death is investigated. Out on the lake, wardens educate the public on staying safe. As night falls, a car crash turns into a manhunt.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Bigger and Better: Deadly Conduct
programme.desc: Inman and Eddins assist on a manhunt when a suspect runs a constable off the road. An ordinary fishing check in Navarro County leads Amundson to illegal activity. In Jasper County, game wardens patrol an area after receiving trespassing complaints.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Shrimp and Run
programme.desc: For Texas game wardens, the unexpected is all part of the routine. A shrimp boat tries to make a run for it. One warden makes some furry friends. A simple trespass warning turns into a trip to jail. A warden helps a woman spiraling out of control.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Crossing the Line
programme.desc: With oyster season in full swing, Texas game wardens ensure everyone is following the rules on land and water. Hunters are investigated for trespassing on private property. The game wardens find an oyster boat deckhand with several warrants.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Finding a Felon
programme.desc: In Texas, Game Wardens are the guardians of the state's wildlife. Game Warden Herchman saves an owl, while Game Wardens Richards and McGee team up to work a case in an archery-only county. Game Wardens Benge and King investigate a poaching case.

programme.title: Too Cute!: Fluffiest Kittens
programme.desc: These Maine Coon, Persian and Siberian kittens are the cutest of the cute.

programme.title: My Cat From Hell: Feral Scottish Fold
programme.desc: Stray, Buddy, a Scottish Fold, has pulled owners heartstrings and rip her to shreds. Angela and Gloria's cat goes into full out-to-kill mode on their other cats.

programme.title: The Vet Life: A Boy Who Spayed Wolf
programme.desc: After a howling fun father-son trip with his boys, Dr. Blue recruits Dr. Ross to tackle two wolf spays at a local sanctuary. Dr. Lavigne performs a bionic surgery on a pit bull with a torn ACL. New vet Dr. Fedke treats a cat with a creepy, crawly injury.

programme.title: Dr. Jeff: Rocky Mountain Vet: A Brave Pit Bull
programme.desc: When Dr. Jeff examines a beloved Weimaraner who has stopped eating, he makes a surprising discovery. Dr. Baier investigates the cause of a pet rabbit's mysterious fur loss. A servicewoman asks Dr. Jeff for help with her precious pit bull's injured leg.

programme.title: The Zoo: The Great Gaur Move
programme.desc: Keepers introduce three gaur, a large, skittish species of cattle, to the rest of the herd. A sickly Sambar fawn is rushed to the health center. Plus, the bird department excitedly prepares for the arrival of great hornbills.

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo: Save the Elephants
programme.desc: An elephant family has a potentially deadly virus affecting animals in captivity and in the wild. With the youngest members of the family most at risk, the keepers and the zoo's veterinary team must do all they can to combat the mysterious illness.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Long Road Home
programme.desc: After more than ten years in the kennels, a survivor from Hurricane Katrina gets a chance at a forever home. Then, when Matt and Louise head out in search of a loose pit bull they discover more than they bargained for.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Why We Go On
programme.desc: Tia battles a local shelter on the fate of a pit bull she risked it all to save. Another dog that was rescued from death has a chance at a forever home.

programme.title: River Monsters: Chainsaw Predator
programme.desc: Angler Jeremy Wade heads to a remote river in the Australian outback to try and catch the rare but fearsome freshwater sawfish.

programme.title: Movie: Daddy's Little Girls
programme.desc: A poor mechanic falls in love with his successful attorney while he fights for custody of his three daughters to protect them from an abusive mother. He must now protect his children and not let the love of his life slip away.

programme.title: Movie: The Family That Preys
programme.desc: Two families of different backgrounds have to learn to work together despite the odds against them.

programme.title: Movie: Good Deeds
programme.desc: A wealthy businessman's predictable life changes when he meets a single mother who lives a modest life.

programme.title: Tyler Perry's the Oval: Heat
programme.desc: Barry takes the law into his own hands as he seeks to be a hero for his family.

programme.title: Tyler Perry's Sistas: A Woman with No Soul
programme.desc: Changes in Andi's situation-ship leave her reeling. Sabrina's confusion causes her to avoid Calvin altogether. Karen struggles to put the past behind her. Danni discovers more about Zac's struggles without Karen.

programme.title: Girlfriends: In Too Deep
programme.desc: Joan returns to work at the J-Spot only to find that William has put Monica in charge of managing the bar to get her out of his hair. Darnell is having a hard time telling Maya that he wants to quit working for the pit crew.

programme.title: Girlfriends: Bad Blood
programme.desc: Joan starts to realize that Maya's house has become the hangout spot and that she is no longer the center of the friendship. Joan's doctor tells her that her cholesterol is too high so she decides to have personal training sessions at her house.

programme.title: Girlfriends: Hustle and Dough
programme.desc: Lynn informs the girls that she is performing at a local club. While waiting at the club Lynn meets a record executive who offers to help her with her career, but wants something in return. Lynn falls asleep while waiting for her chance to perform.

programme.title: Girlfriends: Everybody Hates Monica
programme.desc: When Toni was in town for a brief visit, Joan learns that Maya and Lynn did not tell her about the recent outing they had. Joan insists on bringing Monica into the circle of friends. Maya and Lynn accuse her of using Monica as a substitute for Toni.

programme.title: Girlfriends: If You Can't Stand the Heat, Get Out of the Boonies
programme.desc: Maya discovers Jabari has been skipping school and has plagiarized a writing assignment. Lynn suggests that he may be acting out and Maya disagrees insisting she is giving him a better life. Later, Jabari gets arrested.

programme.title: Girlfriends: Just Joan
programme.desc: Joan complains about the dating scene and her social life, so Maya challenges her to accept singleness and go to a trendy restaurant by herself. William must figure out how to keep Monica from learning he was once married to Lynn.

programme.title: Girlfriends: Karaokee-Dokee
programme.desc: Joan and Maya discover that Lynn is singing for money on the street and at a Karaoke bar. They try suggesting other ways to help launch her music career, but Lynn tells them to stop meddling. Meanwhile, Monica becomes jealous of William and Joan.

programme.title: Girlfriends: He Had a Dream
programme.desc: Maya struggles with taking care of Jabari and the responsibilities of homeownership while Darnell is in Florida. Maya becomes hysterical when she can't reach him after a crash in his NASCAR pit. William and Monica struggle with a seating chart.

programme.title: Girlfriends: I'll Have a Blue Line Christmas
programme.desc: The cute teacher, Aaron, which Joan met in New Orleans, arrives back in California and calls to ask her out. The first few dates are too good to be true, so Joan begins to look for things to go wrong.

programme.title: A Different World: That's the Trouble With You All

programme.title: A Different World: Hillman Isn't Through With Ya Yet

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: Be My Baby Tonight

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: Bundle of Joy
programme.desc: The family fantasizes about what their lives will be like after the baby is born.

programme.title: Martin: Baby You Can Drive My Car
programme.desc: The gang all chip in for a raffle ticket and they win a brand new SUV.

programme.title: Martin: Variety Show
programme.desc: Martin is chosen to produce a charity show, but lets the power go to his head.

programme.title: Martin: Woman With a Past
programme.desc: After he finds out that a recent radio guest once dated Gina, Martin becomes jealous.

programme.title: Martin: The Parents Are Coming
programme.desc: Gina wants Martin to meet her conservative parents, but Martin feels uneasy. Wanting to make a good first impression, he takes advice from Tommy and Cole.

programme.title: Martin: Checks, Lies and Videotape
programme.desc: A crooked preacher cons thousands of dollars from churchgoers, so Martin and Gina try to catch his confession on video.

programme.title: Meet the Browns: Meet the Football Coach
programme.desc: Cora becomes coach of the football team, leading them to win their first game ever. Later, Sasha is introduced to Simone's mother who is less than thrilled about him.

programme.title: Meet the Browns: Meet the Shopaholic
programme.desc: Online shopping becomes an addiction for Cora; Brown starts digging for treasure in his backyard after finding an artifact.

programme.title: Black-ish: I'm a Survivor
programme.desc: When Dre goes back to Compton for a funeral, he is reunited with his old crew and struggles with survivor's remorse for the friends he left behind. Meanwhile, Bow becomes self-conscious when Ruby criticizes her parenting style.

programme.title: Black-ish: One Angry Man
programme.desc: Dre is forced to participate in jury duty after Junior responds to the summons that was thrown away. The case is supposed to be open and shut, but when Dre sees that the defendant is a young African American, he feels responsible to give him a fair trial.

programme.title: Black-ish: ToysRn'tUs
programme.desc: Janine gives Diane a white Girlstory doll for her birthday, and when Bow tries to return it for a black doll, she is shocked by the limited options offered.

programme.title: Black-ish: Manternity
programme.desc: Dre considers taking paternity leave after he realizes that Zoey is arguably the best child and their bond developed while he was unemployed when she was born. Meanwhile, Bow tries to hide her pregnancy in order to get a promotion.

programme.title: Black-ish: Richard Youngsta
programme.desc: Dre is excited about doing a campaign with a popular rap star but becomes conflicted when Bow and Ruby provide feedback suggesting it plays on stereotypes. Meanwhile, Bow is determined to get the family to stop eating so much take-out food.

programme.title: Black-ish: What Lies Beneath
programme.desc: Dre's sister Rhonda is in town, and he feels a little jealous of her close relationship with Pops. Dre and Bow urge Zoey to take Junior to a high school party, and things get out of hand.

programme.title: Movie: Belly
programme.desc: Two partners in crime who rob nightclubs together begin to question each other's loyalty.

programme.title: Movie: Skyfall

programme.title: Movie: London Has Fallen
programme.desc: Mike Banning uncovers a plot to assassinate the leaders of the world during the Prime Minister's funeral in London.

programme.title: Movie: The Hitman's Bodyguard
programme.desc: A notorious hitman who is set to testify against a ruthless dictator becomes targeted by his goons and assassins. In order to stay alive and make it to The Hague he has to team up with the government aged who's been a thorn in his side for years.

programme.desc: Fry ends up with more than he bargained for when he makes a deal with the Robot Devil.

programme.desc: Aliens attack Earth in the form of deadly electrical tornadoes. Now a tornado blogger, a father and his brilliant high school daughter must discover a way to stop the aliens and save the world.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Chaser
programme.desc: A man who purchases a love potion to win the woman of his dreams finds it works too well.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: A Passage for Trumpet
programme.desc: A depressed trumpet player decides to commit suicide when he feels his life is pointless.

programme.title: Movie: Kill Switch
programme.desc: An experiment for unlimited energy goes wrong setting a pilot on a dangerous mission.

programme.title: Movie: Skyfall
programme.desc: The charming James Bond faces another challenging situation as M deals with her power being threatened. Past events are revealed, as James Bond is possibly the only agent able to help M through this troubling time as action-packed attacks wage on.

programme.title: Movie: Blair Witch
programme.desc: A group of college students go to the Black Hills Forest to search for James' sister, whose disappearance is connected to the legend of the Blair Witch. As the night wears on, they discover the legend is real when they are attacked by a sinister presence.

programme.title: Movie: Annabelle: Creation
programme.desc: A group of orphan girls are invited to live with a husband and wife who lost their own daughter in an accident over a decade earlier. When one of the girls finds the dead daughter's doll, it turns out to be possessed and begins terrorizing the innocents.

programme.title: Good Bones: The Little Brick House
programme.desc: Mina and Karen are tackling their first renovation of a brick house, and although it has tons of charm and character, it also has problems that need to be fixed. Plus, it's in a new neighborhood for them, which adds to the risk.

programme.title: Good Bones: Budget-busting Victorian
programme.desc: Mina and Karen purchase a home near the Northside neighborhood that's full of historical features. They work on an open floor plan, but structural slow-downs and permitting nightmares threaten their schedule and budget.

programme.title: Good Bones: Old Doors, New Wall
programme.desc: Mina and Karen work on a duplex unit that's riddled with trash and interesting surprises, including a wall made entirely out of old doors. However, further problems arise when Cory discovers a foundation issue no one saw coming.

programme.title: Good Bones: Nothing's Easy on East Street
programme.desc: After going underwater on previous East Street investments, Mina and Karen return and hope their third flip is a charm. They plan to give a home more bathrooms and an open floor plan, but Cory discovers a budget-busting water line issue.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: The Tybee Time Has Come

programme.title: Paranormal Caught on Camera: Encounter at an Abandoned Asylum and More

programme.title: Paranormal Caught on Camera: A Highly Haunted Hotel in Arkansas and More

programme.title: Paranormal Caught on Camera: Florida Sea Monster Attack and More

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: Captain Sandy's Yachtrageous Moments
programme.desc: Captain Sandy and her crew relive the best and worst moments from three seasons sailing the Mediterranean. They recall unforgettable crews, over-the-top guests and the real action down below.

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: Docked and Loaded
programme.desc: Captain Sandy continues her on-going battle with Sirocco's anchors, while Joao and Travis continue their deep dive to set the anchors free. Baseball star Johnny Damon and his family and friends deal with bad weather and a feisty yacht owner.

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: Monte Car-loco
programme.desc: The crew enjoys a day off at an exclusive resort in Monte Carlo, but some of them are faced with more than they bargained for. Joao and Hannah have a heart to heart, while June tries to open herself up to Hannah with not so favourable results.

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: Don't Cry for Me, Sirocco
programme.desc: Captain Sandy finds one of the crew member's positions redundant. Joao finally confronts Jack on his lack of work ethic giving him an ultimatum. An overwhelmed Anastasia is pushed to her breaking point in the galley. Then, Colin makes a bold move.

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: It's Ben a Long Time
programme.desc: Colin faces a tough decision and Anastasia accepts her new role, but Sandy wonders if she's now phoning her job in. An all-female group come on board and do their best to flirt with the deck crew. Jack and Aesha move in together.

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: Nauti Girls Need Love Too
programme.desc: Ben's first dinner doesn’t wow the guests as much as he had hoped leaving him questioning if he still has his sea legs. Anastasia has a hard time adjusting back to her old third stew role.

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: Holy Ship!
programme.desc: Ben is determined to regain his sea legs, but Sirocco's faulty galley has other plans. Travis' latest drunken night has Sandy at the end of her rope. Jack ups his romance game by writing poetry for Aesha.

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: Sweet White Glove O' Mine
programme.desc: The charter guests request a White Party for their final dinner, and Ben goes to great lengths in creating a menu for the theme. Joao's ego gets him in hot water with Captain Sandy, while Jack enlists the crew to help him ask Aesha to be his girlfriend.

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: Love, Love Me Stew
programme.desc: The crew prepares for the final chapter of the season, and with Joao sidelined with a fever, Travis is forced to step up. Bad weather rolls into the south of France leaving Sirocco stuck at the dock, adding more pressure on the interior team to perform.

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: Au Revoir, Sirocco

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Twisted in Texas

programme.title: Unexplained and Unexplored: Ghost Ship of the Damned
Mysteries of the Abandoned: Secrets of the Doomsday Caves
programme.desc: A vast network of subterranean bunkers in the American west was home to the power to destroy nations, but today, this facility is deserted, and new discoveries reveal why this eerie place was built and why it was abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: The Real Shawshank

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Wild West Apocalypse

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Amazon Ghost Town

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files: CIA's Secret Revenge

programme.desc: The task force finds the streets of Newark busier than ever during a rainstorm. An unexpected surprise forces the unit into pursuit. A crazy driver puts the unit's wet-weather skills to the test.

programme.title: Manhunters: Fugitive Task Force: Relentless
programme.desc: Detectives search for a 31-year-old male fugitive wanted for first-degree murder and weapons possession.

programme.title: Manhunters: Fugitive Task Force: Perfect Storm
programme.desc: Detectives track a fugitive wanted for the second-degree rape of a young woman barely out of high school.

programme.title: Manhunters: Fugitive Task Force: Unthinkable
programme.desc: Officers search for a sex offender on the run, and aim to find him before sunrise.

programme.title: Manhunters: Fugitive Task Force: Roxanne's First Fugitive
programme.desc: Detective Roxanne Lopez has two conflicting tips about where a sexual offender may be.

programme.title: Manhunters: Fugitive Task Force: Hot and Cold
programme.desc: Officers nab a parole violator who raped a nine-year old and search for a fugitive wanted for violating parole on a manslaughter conviction.

programme.title: Jacked: Auto Theft Task Force: I Was Gonna Go Home
programme.desc: The team tracks a stolen vehicle, blocks it in, and captures a gang member.

programme.title: Jacked: Auto Theft Task Force: Nothing Good Happens After Midnight
programme.desc: The Task force realizes that finding cars are not their only job. They take down robbers, and then search for a man with a gun.

programme.title: Jacked: Auto Theft Task Force: Saturday Night
programme.desc: A deliveryman has his car stolen at gunpoint, and the unit uses a decoy vehicle to try to catch the suspects. The Unit changes their schedule to catch the thieves off guard.

programme.title: Jacked: Auto Theft Task Force: I Just Wanted My Burger
programme.desc: The A.T.T.F. is on the prowl in Newark, New Jersey and they have plenty to keep them busy. First they get a work out when a perp takes off running, later they recover a stolen tractor trailer and a stolen car at a drive-thru window.

programme.title: Manhunters: Fugitive Task Force: Hip Hop Homicide
programme.desc: A rising hip-hop star is gunned down in Orlando, Florida and detectives work around the clock to bring closure to the mourning parents.

programme.title: Manhunters: Fugitive Task Force: Predator Pursuit
programme.desc: A twice convicted and particularly dangerous pedophile and sexual predator from Georgia is pursued before he hurts someone again.

programme.title: American Justice: A Questionable Doctor
programme.desc: Dr. Naramore was convicted of attempting to murder a 78-year-old terminally ill woman.

programme.title: American Justice: A Warrant to Kill
programme.desc: A look at the dispute between Deputy Sheriff Joseph Kent McGowan and Susan White.

programme.title: Nightwatch: Animal Instinct
programme.desc: Two officers are helped by the K9 Unit to corral a suspect who takes off running after a car chase. Rush and Rutledge struggle to convince a man with heart problems to go to the hospital. A car careens off a bridge and the driver can't be found.

programme.title: Nightwatch: 100%, Every Time
programme.desc: Randy and Justin chase down a suspected car thief, while both EMT teams respond to emergency calls involving children in distress.

programme.title: Kansas City SWAT
programme.desc: It's a tense situation as Sgt. Paul Hamilton and his squad get caught up in a high-speed car chase to bring down a suspected auto theft ring. Later, Paul's squad joins Huth's to double their efforts and hit two houses at once.

programme.title: Kansas City SWAT
programme.desc: Officer Tim Davis' morning run is interrupted by a barricaded gunman who has taken two women hostages, his sister and his girlfriend. Then the already nerve-racking domestic dispute grows even more tense when gunshots ring out inside the home.

programme.title: Kansas City SWAT
programme.desc: Charles 'Chip' Huth and Kansas City SWAT head out on a high-stakes drug-warrant. The team will make simultaneous hits on two locations in the same apartment complex.

programme.title: Dallas SWAT
programme.desc: Corporal Rich Emberlin and Corporal Robert Cockerill must charge into a house to nab a murder suspect who allegedly knifed his neighbour to death; in their off hours, Emberlin tries desperately to get his ex-girlfriend back and Cockerill gets in shape.

programme.title: American Monster: Take Me to the River
programme.desc: Coming home from church, a local preacher finds his wife brutally stabbed and beaten, the apparent victim of a home invasion. His alibi is sound, as are their two grown sons. However, several details just don't add up. The truth shocks everyone.

programme.title: American Monster: Into the Swamp
programme.desc: At a family-run construction company, brothers and cousins work hard together - and play even harder. But when one of them vanishes, no one has answers. The mystery of his disappearance - and the salacious betrayal behind it - isn't solved for 20 years.

programme.title: American Monster: Family Snapshot
programme.desc: The Yates family moves to Washington only to find it besieged by a serial killer who's targeting young women and confounding the police. Now, the family's never-before-aired home videos provide a chilling look of one of America's most notorious killers.

programme.title: American Monster: The Last Valentine
programme.desc: In Oklahoma, Dr. John Hamilton and his wife Susan are the envy of all: successful, respected and very much in love - until a vicious Valentine's Day murder destroys their lives.

programme.title: American Monster: Stages of Grief
programme.desc: In suburban California, an intruder brutally attacks and kills Joan Dawley. As the Dawley family grieves, it's up to LAPD detectives to crack the case. Secret home movies uncover a shocking tale of deceit, and a monster lurking behind the scenes.

programme.title: American Monster: Momma's Girl
programme.desc: A look at killers who are hiding in plain sight.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: In Defiance of Evil
programme.desc: A teenager vanishes during a bike ride through Defiance Park. The investigation into her disappearance leads police to fear that a serial killer is on the loose in Tacoma.

programme.title: American Monster: Twice Shy
programme.desc: Carol-Ann and James Sharp seem like a match made in heaven, but behind the veneer of happiness hides a monster in plain sight. Loved ones close to the couple sit down for the first time on camera to make sense of a murder that none of them saw coming.

programme.title: American Monster: Momma's Girl
programme.desc: A look at killers who are hiding in plain sight.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: In Defiance of Evil
programme.desc: A teenager vanishes during a bike ride through Defiance Park. The investigation into her disappearance leads police to fear that a serial killer is on the loose in Tacoma.

programme.title: American Monster: Twice Shy
programme.desc: Carol-Ann and James Sharp seem like a match made in heaven, but behind the veneer of happiness hides a monster in plain sight. Loved ones close to the couple sit down for the first time on camera to make sense of a murder that none of them saw coming.

programme.title: American Monster: Stages of Grief
programme.desc: In suburban California, an intruder brutally attacks and kills Joan Dawley. As the Dawley family grieves, it's up to LAPD detectives to crack the case. Secret home movies uncover a shocking tale of deceit, and a monster lurking behind the scenes.

programme.title: Wicked Attraction: A Slice of Murder
programme.desc: A homicidal manager with a pizza chain unleashes a reign of terror and murder accompanied by his twisted new girlfriend who entices fresh victims.

programme.title: Wicked Attraction: Wheels of Steel
programme.desc: Two twisted friends will stop at nothing to steal nurse Sandra Stotler's flashy cars. They shoot her and dump the body in a lake, but plan to kill again to get their hands on her second vehicle.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: Good Morning, Goodnight and Goodbye
programme.desc: A teenage girl disappears on her way to visit friends. As police retrace her last known movements, they uncover a terrifying possibility, the 16-year-old may have been kidnapped by an international human trafficking ring.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: Smoke and Lies
programme.desc: Police investigate a residential house fire and discover it was intentionally set to cover-up a savage murder. Had the killer managed to destroy all the evidence or was there a clue he overlooked?

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: A Hero Betrayed
programme.desc: When a hero firefighter is found savagely murdered in his own home, the trail of evidence police find takes them on a twisting and tension filled journey to justice.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Decades of Deceit
programme.desc: After more than two decades a family finds out who murdered their daughter, a young mother, with the help of a Facebook savvy police officer who never worked a homicide case.

programme.title: 48 Hours Mystery: Deadly Prophecy
programme.desc: A mother has a vision of dying before she drowns.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Don't Scream
programme.desc: A young mom calls 911 claiming she cut her own throat in front of her ex-husband and child. Doctors say there’s no way she did it to herself.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Next Door to Crazy
programme.desc: A teacher and her son get a new start in a Las Vegas home, but soon find themselves the targets of vicious harassment and escalating intimidation by the woman who lives next door. Her fury knows no limits, and there's no telling how far she will go.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Landlord, Death Lord
programme.desc: A young couple finds their paradise in a Vancouver, Washington housing development with strict codes of community conduct. But someone forgot to tell their neighbour the rules, and he will resist them at all costs.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Nail in the Coffin
programme.desc: The promise of peaceful life in Tamarac, Florida is broken when the son of a newly arrived family befriends the neighborhood's most unruly kids. Bad blood between the neighbors boils over until things come to a horrifically violent end on Halloween.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Feud on the Frontier
programme.desc: Two neighboring frontiersmen get along great until one's dog frightens the other's daughter and grandson. It's soon all out war that will leave one of them shot dead and the other in a white knuckle standoff with police.

programme.title: Nazi Fugitives: Paul Touvier
programme.desc: French investigators hunt down Paul Touvier, a pro-Nazi sympathizer who was responsible for murdering both Jews and resistance fighters. This 'Hangman of Lyon' hid himself with the assistance of a right wing group associated with the Catholic Church.

programme.title: Nazi Fugitives: Franz Stangl and Gustav Wagner
programme.desc: See how Nazi hunter Simon Wiesenthal tracked down fugitive war criminal Franz Stangl in Brazil. Stangl was responsible for the murder of over 800,000 people.

programme.title: Nazi Death Squads: Funeral Pyres
programme.desc: Faced with the advancing Soviet troops, Nazi Germany decides to have the bodies of death camp victims dug up and burned in graves.

programme.title: Nazi Death Squads: Time of Reckoning
programme.desc: After being judged at the Nuremberg trials, the majority of those responsible for the murders of nearly 1.5 million Jews would walk free in the 1950s.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Desert War
programme.desc: The war that's encompassed the globe takes root in Africa. An ambitious Mussolini expands the war into North Africa; he sends ill-prepared soldiers, and forces Hitler to come to his ally's aid.

programme.title: World War II in Color: The Soviet Steamroller
programme.desc: By mid-1943, Hitler was on the run. The reality of a war on two fronts had caught up with him. In the West an Allied assault on Italy threatened his southern flank. In the East, exhausted German troops were fighting against the Soviet military machine.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Victory in Europe
programme.desc: As 1945 began, Hitler's Third Reich was entering its death throes. In the west, Allied forces were within striking distance of the Rhine. In the east, a Red Army blitzkrieg brought Soviet forces to the River Oder just an hour's drive from Berlin.

programme.title: World War II in Color: The Mediterranean and North Africa
programme.desc: Italy's dictator Benito Mussolini dreamt of recreating the Roman Empire. The Mediterranean would become Italy's lake with a great new colonial empire on its southern shore including British-controlled Egypt and Sudan.

programme.title: World War II in Color: The Soviet Steamroller
programme.desc: By mid-1943, Hitler was on the run. The reality of a war on two fronts had caught up with him. In the West an Allied assault on Italy threatened his southern flank. In the East, exhausted German troops were fighting against the Soviet military machine.
