programme.title: Nazi Death Squads: Funeral Pyres
programme.desc: Faced with the advancing Soviet troops, Nazi Germany decides to have the bodies of death camp victims dug up and burned in graves.

programme.title: Return Salute
programme.desc: Returning military service personnel are granted a special wish in return for the sacrifices they have made on behalf of their country.

programme.title: Coming Home: Redemption on the Water
programme.desc: Iraq veteran Cody Howard is a professional Kayaker. Diagnosed with PTSD, he was able to recover by returning to the water to face highly challenging rivers and waterfalls. Now, Cody reaches out to other wounded vets, exposing them to the same thrill.

programme.title: Feats of Valor
programme.desc: Featuring five incredible acts of courage, celebrating the remarkable heroes who risked their lives to save their fellow soldiers, receiving the Medal of Honour, the Bronze Star and the Silver Star for their service and sacrifice.

programme.title: Against the Odds: The Untold Story of the Rescue at Dogshead
programme.desc: Charlie Company of the 1st Cavalry Division wanders into an NVA stronghold. A blistering attack leaves supplies low, casualties mounting and the enemy circle tightening. Team Alpha, hearing the distress calls, volunteers to try the difficult rescue.

programme.title: Against the Odds: A Chance in Hell: The Battle of Ramadi
programme.desc: When Colonel McFarland arrived in Iraq, Al-Qaeda had already declared Ramadi the capital of a new caliphate. The soldiers of McFarland's Ready First Combat Team fight to give American a victory.

programme.title: Against the Odds: Fighting Fox: Road to Hell
programme.desc: The paratroopers of Fighting Fox Company, 2nd Battalion, 506th Parachute Infantry Regiment fought and died from Normandy to Hitler's Eagle's Nest. Their sheer determination against the enemy was matched only by their devotion to one another.

programme.title: Against the Odds: The Death Ridges of Peleliu
programme.desc: The First Marine Division forged a ferocious struggle with the Japanese at Peleliu. It would take 74 days and cost 10,000 American lives but the blood and courage of this small band of heroes would ultimately break the back of the enemy.

programme.title: Warrior POV: Beheading the Taliban
programme.desc: In Afghanistan in 2006, US Army Green Berets take on nearly 1000 Taliban fighters in one of the most intense battles of the War on Terror. Five years after the 9/ 11 attacks, Task Force 31 launches a full-scale attack on a hill called Sperwan Ghar.

programme.title: Warrior POV: Screaming Eagles in Afghanistan
programme.desc: In 2010, the 'Screaming Eagles' of the 101st Airborne Division face off against the Taliban during Operation Dragon Strike. The American soldiers of the 101st head up Afghanistan's 'Highway to Hell' to take back the countryside from a deadly enemy.

programme.title: Warrior POV: Fallujah
programme.desc: Fallujah, Iraq's most volatile city, has become a haven for radical Muslim fighters from around the world. To root them out, the U.S. military unleashes Operation Phantom Fury. Soldiers and Marines engage the enemy in brutal urban combat.

programme.title: Restored: 1906 Arts and Crafts House
programme.desc: Brett is called upon to restore a historically significant 1906 arts and crafts home. He brings it back to its original glory by reintroducing the closed-in fireplaces, re-instating the floor plan and replacing the 1980s kitchen.

programme.title: Restored: 1913 Mission Revival Mansion
programme.desc: Brett Waterman helps a mother and her grown-up children restore their majestic 1913 Mission Revival mansion. He's elated when he realizes he can restore the original linoleum in the kitchen, but the homeowners may not open to the idea.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: North Pole
programme.desc: Bryce Ward, mayor of North Pole, and his dad, Jeff, build a family recreation cabin deep in the woods of Alaska with the help of their life-long camping buddies.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Alaskan Glacier
programme.desc: Alaskan adventure guide Don Lee is building a remote survival cabin on top of a glacier where no man has stepped before. But in an area plagued with avalanches and unpredictable weather, this fearless bushman needs to time his construction perfectly.

programme.title: Building Alaska: This Was A Rough One
programme.desc: The Owens work to finish the roof, but multiple falling objects and whiteout conditions make the job perilous.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Have Saw, Will Cut
programme.desc: Jackie's team delivers French Doors only to find the frame fits incorrectly during installation. A snow machine delivery runs into problems on the melted trail at the Hill's build site.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Building Alaska, the New Generation
programme.desc: A new generation of builders tackles the Alaskan wilds to build off-the-grid cabins. First-time builder Nick faces some harsh realities when he can't use the trees on his build site for lumber. Brannon's team develops a unique foundation system.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Hard Work Beats Talent
programme.desc: Reality sets in for first-time extreme cabin builder Nick Blanco in Alaska as he fights the tides trying to retrieve pylons for his foundation. Brannon's team gets stuck on the muddy trail bringing in more build materials.

programme.desc: Anthony and Cristina have an awesome backyard pool that they can't see from their overgrown, aging deck.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: A Family Gathering Place
programme.desc: Chase and his team take on a project on McGrath Pond in Oakland, ME, that has been empty for 15 years. Stephanie bought this place from her father and promised him she would fix it up.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Bunganuc Creek Landmark
programme.desc: The team take on an historic clammers' shack with a renovation that includes opening up boarded windows as well as clearing out animal droppings and years or trash and old machinery. Everyone in town watches as they work on the historic landmark.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Clearwater Camp
programme.desc: The team take on a cabin in Industry, ME, that hasn't been touched since the 1970's. Loads of issues arise once the snow melts and they start digging in.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Desert Pond Hideaway
programme.desc: Chase and the team travel to a secluded piece of land close to Desert Pond to help a couple turn their forgotten shack into a relaxing retreat. The couple have big ambitions leaving the crew stretching a $30,000 budget in only four weeks.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Family Fishing Cabin
programme.desc: The crew work to save an old cabin in Oakland, Maine, that Eric purchased from his father. He hopes the renovation will give the cabin many more years of life so he can shire his childhood memories there with his own children.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Family's Empty Nest
programme.desc: A family has the resources to give their Lincolnville, Maine, cabin the love it deserves now that their four children are almost done with college. However the cabin has been neglected for 25 years and corners were cut in the original build.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: The Hiltz Camp
programme.desc: Chase and his team are in the woods of New Sharon, Maine, to help Rod save his rundown camp from falling into the pristine Kimball Pond. He'd like to patch up the holes and get his wife to come back to the camp, which means a lot of hard work.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: The Morrill Family Bunkhouse
programme.desc: Chase Morrill and his team of builders take on the old army barracks on their family camp that has served as overflow sleeping for over 40 years.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Veterans' Retreat
programme.desc: A man is building a retreat to help combat-injured veterans and their families adjust to their new normal. The team are tasked with turning a cottage into an ADA-compliant event center. The key feature will be a deck that can accommodate up to 40.

programme.title: Cupcake Wars: Cupcake Couture
programme.desc: Cupcakes meet high fashion as four talented bakers vie for a place at a VIP celebration for Vanessa and Angela Simmons' Pastry Shoes.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Aporkalypse Now
programme.desc: Noah visits the Great American Foodie Fest in Las Vegas and the Topfield Fair in Massachusetts.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Garlic's Angels
programme.desc: Noah Cappe packs his breath mints and heads to the South Florida Garlic Festival in Delray Beach, Fla., where the stinking rose makes an appearance in fair foods like the claw cake burger and mojo pork pockets.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Dates on a Plane
programme.desc: Noah Cappe arrives in the California desert for a date with deliciousness at the Riverside County Fair and National Date Festival. He tries spicy treats like the fire fingers kartwheel and the sonoran fire dog.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Mad Snacks: Berry Road
programme.desc: Noah Cappe travels back in time at the Texas Renaissance Festival, where the medieval-inspired meals range from the Sir Francis fry dog to the crown jewel. Then it's over to Plant City, Fla., where Noah chows down on some berry delicious carnival treats.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Requiem For An Ice Cream
programme.desc: Noah Cappe rolls into Alabama for some country carnival cookin' at the Greater Gulf State Fair in Mobile. He digs into the dirty bird turkey leg and takes a ride on a crazy midway mashup.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Eggs Men
programme.desc: Noah Cappe gets the royal treatment with "ye olde eats" at the Hoggetown Medieval Faire in Gainesville, Fla. Meat is all over the menu, and Noah goes wild for the smoked bison burger and the wild boar leg.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Shanghai
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern introduces the popular tastes of Shanghai, China. From creamy hairy crab and savory pork-filled dumplings to rice wine-soaked chicken and scallion pancakes on the go, cuisine in this big city is sweet and simple.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Charleston
programme.desc: Andrew explores coastal classics like shrimp and grits, she-crab soup, and barbecue.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Portugal
programme.desc: Andrew reveals Lisbon's iconic seafood, pork sandwiches, and custard tarts.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Lima
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern uncovers the most famous foods in this Peruvian city by the sea.

programme.title: Food Paradise: Totally Unexpected
programme.desc: From a password-protected cheeseburger in Chicago to top-notch barbecue in at a Walla Walla gas station, we try the most delicious dishes at the most surprising places across the country.

programme.title: Food Paradise: Swine and Dine
programme.desc: From a triple-wide Cajun country pork chop to a sky-high stack of piggy perfection, there's almost too much pork to fit on a fork at these dining destinations.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Shanghai
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern introduces the popular tastes of Shanghai, China. From creamy hairy crab and savory pork-filled dumplings to rice wine-soaked chicken and scallion pancakes on the go, cuisine in this big city is sweet and simple.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: Southern Comfort Brunch
programme.desc: Bobby derives inspiration from the sweet and savoury ingredients of Southern style.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: Irish Style Brunch
programme.desc: Chef Bobby Flay showcases his Irish pride in this festive and colorful brunch menu including a bangers and egg sandwich with Irish cheddar and tomato jam, Irish-style potato pancakes with mustard-chive crème fraiche and smoked salmon.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: Luck of the Irish
programme.desc: Bobby's recent trip to the Emerald Isle was clearly on his mind, when he came up with his succulent and savory Irish style brunch menu. Bobby creates a bountiful family style platter filled with some of Ireland's favorites.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: Waffles Gone Wild

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: Bread-Y for Brunch
programme.desc: Chef Bobby shows us how to get creative with bread. His menu features frittata di pane with broccoli rabe, sausage ricotta, and blueberry-lemon bread pudding muffins.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: Bread Lovers' Brunch
programme.desc: Chef Bobby Flay takes an essential element of brunch, bread, and makes it the star of every dish on his inventive menu from croque Madame bread pudding with herb-crusted tomatoes to a simple pull-apart cinnamon bread and a gazpacho bloody Maria.

programme.desc: Mickey finds an egg, which soon hatches a baby dragon.

programme.title: The Pacific: Basilone

programme.title: The Pacific: Melbourne
programme.desc: Physically and mentally debilitated after the four-month ordeal on Guadalcanal, Leckie, Basilone and thousands of their comrades land in Melbourne, where they are greeted by adoring crowds and viewed as the saviours of Australia.

programme.title: The Pacific: Gloucester/ Pavuvu/ Banika

programme.title: The Pacific: Peleliu Landing

programme.title: The Pacific: Peleliu Airfield

programme.desc: Set to the backdrop of Awesome Mixtape #2, the Guardians continue to fight threats to the galaxy and keep their family together. When a new mission leads to clues about Peter's parentage, they journey to unravel the secrets of Star-Lord's past.

programme.title: Movie: Cowboys and Aliens
programme.desc: The Wild West and Outer Space collide when a spaceship lands with the intention of taking over the world in 1873. Sophisticated technology and human ingenuity clash as a group of cowboys and natives fight to thwart the aliens' plans of world domination.

programme.title: Bones: The Turn in the Urn
programme.desc: When a wealthy artifact collector walks into his own funeral, the Jeffersonian team must find out to whom the cremated remains at the funeral belong. The investigation gets complicated when the team finds there are three sets of remains in the urn.

programme.title: Bones: The High in the Low
programme.desc: The Jeffersonian team investigates the death of an art school dropout with Lupus, whose remains were found inside a log in a forest. The team learns about the victim's use of cannabis to treat her pain, and uncover details that contributed to her death.

programme.title: Bones: The Cold in the Case
programme.desc: The team investigates the murder of a woman whose remains were found in a swamp. When the team realizes that her body was cryogenically frozen before it was disposed, it leads them to a cryogenic preservation facility where they learn about the victim.

programme.title: Bones: The Nail in the Coffin
programme.desc: The Jeffersonian team investigates the death of Stephanie McNamara, the daughter of a wealthy family whose remains were found in a national park. When the team digs deeper, they believe she may be the Ghost Killer's latest victim.

programme.title: Bones: The Drama in the Queen
programme.desc: The Jeffersonian team investigates the death of Brian Thomas, the head swim coach at a community college, whose remains were found dumped at the bottom of a well. Meanwhile, Jeffersonian team gets a new intern who catches Sweets' attention.

programme.title: Charmed: Still Charmed and Kicking

programme.desc: A novelist and her boyfriend head to her late grandmother's house for Christmas.

programme.desc: A bridal boutique owner finds out she'll be working closely with her crush.

programme.desc: Fire sweeps through a mansion, killing two children, all evidence leads to the mother.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Talking Skull
programme.desc: A mapmaker was surveying the grounds of a boy scout ranch when something caught his eye. At first, it appeared to be a turtle shell, but it proved to be a human skull.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Til Death Do Us Part
programme.desc: A Chemist suddenly starts to suffer from foot pain, partial numbness, and hair loss. He was initially mis-diagnosed. Investigators started searching the lab he worked in and interrogated some co-workers.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Core Evidence

programme.title: Forensic Files: Private Thoughts
programme.desc: An entire family found dead inside their burned-out home appears to be a murder-suicide.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Lions and Tigers and Texts

programme.desc: The murder of a navy machinist with high security clearance sends the team on a city-wide hunt tracking evidence. Also, Anna Kolcheck partners with Callen and Sam assists Hetty in the on-going mole investigation.

programme.title: NCIS: Out of the Frying Pan...
programme.desc: Gibbs questions Vance's motives when he is asked to interrogate a teenage boy accused of killing his retired marine father.

programme.title: NCIS: Tell-All
programme.desc: NCIS connects a message left in blood by a murdered navy commander to a manuscript that may contain classified military information.

programme.title: NCIS: Two-Faced
programme.desc: To Gibbs' displeasure, Special Agent E.J. Barrett returns to lead the investigation of a seaman's death that may be connected to a series of port-related murders. Meanwhile, Ziva finally introduces her boyfriend to the team.

programme.title: NCIS: Dead Reflection
programme.desc: The NCIS team tracks down a navy lieutenant's killer after a Pentagon security camera reveals a petty officer committing the crime. Meanwhile, Gibbs announces that Agent Barrett and her team will take over the port-to-port serial killer case.

programme.title: NCIS: Baltimore
programme.desc: After Tony's ex-partner appears to be the latest victim of the Port-to-Port Killer, he revisits his days as a detective in Baltimore.

programme.title: NCIS: Swan Song
programme.desc: After new evidence reveals that the port-to-port killer has infiltrated the agency, the NCIS team chases every lead in a race to track him down.

programme.title: NCIS: Pyramid
programme.desc: The lives of NCIS members are in jeopardy when they come face-to-face with the infamous port-to-port killer.

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent: Best Defense
programme.desc: The detectives suspect the wife of a lawyer when he kills a hit man in his house.

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent: Chinoiserie
programme.desc: When a Chinese immigrant is shot dead, the detectives think it was someone she knew.

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent: Malignant
programme.desc: The murders of two deliverymen lead the detectives to a pharmaceutical drug supplier.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Turn the Light Off
programme.desc: Voight and the team discover a massacre, eight-million in cash stolen and two wounded men cleaning house. During questioning, one guy provides some key intel that leads Antonio to realize that two gangs were involved.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: 8:30
programme.desc: Conclusion, the Intelligence Unit works to find the bombers. Even with the government agencies in the mix, Voight and his team work the case from their own angles and connections. Lindsay and Antonio question doctors who handled a transplant surgery.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: My Way
programme.desc: Commander Perry notifies the Intelligence Unit that Pulpo has been released to help track down a dangerous cartel leader. Meanwhile, Ruzek gets some difficult news as a blast from Lindsay's past comes back.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: The Docks
programme.desc: As Antonio's life is now in question, Voight and Platt open up about their pasts. Jin is caught while tinkering with Voight's computer and uses the only scapegoat possible to keep him in the clear.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: A Beautiful Friendship
programme.desc: Atwater is settling into his new gig on intelligence as Antonio is relegated to desk duty while recovering. Lindsay finally realizes she has no way out and confides in Voight for help.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Call It Macaroni
programme.desc: Jin's murder investigation moves forward and Voight is under close watch by Internal Affairs, but is still in complete command of his unit.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Get My Cigarettes
programme.desc: Intelligence begins to look into a string of murders where the victims have a dollar bill pinned to their chests. Thanks to some digging by Ruzek, Voight learns this friend was involved in some shady business dealings.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: The Weigh Station
programme.desc: The bounty on Halstead's head becomes a serious reality as an innocent bartender takes a bullet meant for him. Olinsky tries to reason with Bembenek to call off the hit, while Voight and his team search for the hired assassin.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Chicken, Dynamite, Chainsaw
programme.desc: Two teenage girls have gone missing, and the team knows the clock is ticking to find them. Halstead, Antonio and Lindsay investigate a tenement that gives them a much needed lead. Voight brings the father of one of the girls in to get some honest answers.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: An Honest Woman
programme.desc: While trying to help out Olive, Voight is attacked and kidnapped. When he does not show up for work, the team gets suspicious and begins investigating. Ruzek and Atwater prove they do belong on the team when they find a lead.

programme.title: Movie: Night at the Museum
programme.desc: Being a night guard at the Museum of Natural History was nothing like what Larry Daley, a single father, was expecting. Once the museum closes for the night, Larry starts hearing strange noises and discovers that the exhibitions come to life.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Orange Is the New Yellow
programme.desc: When Marge gets arrested for letting Bart go to the park unsupervised, she serves time only to realize that prison is a welcome break from the demands of her life as a mom and wife. In her absence, Homer tries to manage the parenting responsibilities.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Monty Burns' Fleeing Circus
programme.desc: When Springfield is burned to the ground, the Simpsons beg Mr. Burns to fund its rebuilding. Burns agrees with one condition: he gets to put on a variety show at the Springfield Bowl.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Friends and Family
programme.desc: Mr. Burns hires the Simpsons to play his live-in virtual reality family, but excludes Homer so that he may play dad. Now alone, Homer finds a new best friend in girl-next-door Julia, who eats, drinks and thinks like him.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Town
programme.desc: After Homer catches Bart rooting for Springfield's football rival, the Boston Americans, he plans a family 'hate-cation' trip to Boston in an attempt to show Bart that Boston is a terrible city.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Trust But Clarify
programme.desc: Lisa and Bart investigate Krusty's suspicious new 'Krustaceans' candy. Meanwhile, Homer wants a promotion at the nuclear plant and asks Marge to help him dress the part, and news anchor Kent Brockman struggles to find his feet in the changing media world.

programme.title: The Simpsons: There Will Be Buds
programme.desc: Homer gets roped into coaching the kids’ lacrosse team with Milhouse’s dad, Kirk, who is in desperate need of a friend. When Kirk gets too clingy, Homer vents about how much of a loser he is.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Havana Wild Weekend
programme.desc: When the Retirement Castle and the V.A. Hospital can't solve Grampa's health issues, the Simpsons decide to take a family trip to Cuba to get him cheap medical care.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Dad Behavior
programme.desc: Homer finds a new app that makes his life much easier and outsources his father-son bonding. Meanwhile, Grampa finds that he is about to be a father again.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Last Traction Hero
programme.desc: A workplace accident leaves Homer in a cast, and in a position to sue Mr. Burns. This leaves Marge unfulfilled, so she turns to an unexpected source for romance. Meanwhile, Lisa is made 'Bus Monitor' and tries to keep the peace.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Pork and Burns
programme.desc: When Marge becomes obsessed with a Japanese style of living, the Simpsons must part with any item that no longer brings them joy. For Homer, this means finding a new home for the family pig.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Great Phatsby
programme.desc: Mr. Burns tries to relive his glory days, and crosses paths with a mysterious music mogul. After being conned by him and reduced to bankruptcy, Mr. Burns seeks revenge on the music producer.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Great Phatsby

programme.title: It's Always Sunny in Philadelphia: Charlie's Mom Has Cancer
programme.desc: As Mac, Charlie and Dee struggle with their faith, Frank loses his memory and his mind in a quest for buried treasure, and they're all rocked by a revelation that will shake Paddy's to its very foundation.

programme.title: Animal Fight Night: Margin of Terror
programme.desc: Wild dogs, big cats and deadly dragons reveal killer instinct.

programme.title: Animal Fight Night: Dare or Die

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files: Secret Aliens
programme.desc: An astronomer records an unusual radio signal from beyond our solar system. FBI agents find classified documents at the home of a NASA scientist. When scientists discover strange DNA in the octopus, they examine if their origins could be alien.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files: Did Aliens Nuke Mars?
programme.desc: Experts investigate if an extraterrestrial Armageddon transformed Mars into the wasteland we know today, after a strange discovery by the Curiosity rover suggests the Red Planet was home to an alien nuclear war 300 million years ago.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Mystery of Spacetime
programme.desc: Spacetime, the secret structure that controls our universe, is a strange four-dimensional substance that controls time, light, and energy, and will also determine how our universe will end.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: The Quasar Enigma
programme.desc: Quasars are the brightest and most powerful objects in our universe, and though they have shaped the cosmos, they might ultimately destroy everything that exists.

programme.title: How the Universe Works
programme.desc: The universe is constantly expanding and so is our understanding of it.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Secret History of Pluto
programme.desc: The first close-up images of Pluto revealed the unimaginable secrets of this mysterious frozen world. Now, scientists investigate if Pluto is home to a warm ocean of liquid water beneath its surface, and whether this underground ocean could harbor life.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Did the Big Bang Really Happen?
programme.desc: New discoveries are causing astronomers to question if the Big Bang really happened, and using the latest science, they investigate if it wasn't just the start of our universe but many mysterious multiverses.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: First Second of the Big Bang
programme.desc: The first second of the Universe, the creation of everything when space, time, matter and energy burst into existence. It is the most important second in history, which seals the Universe's fate and defines everything that comes after - including us.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Secret History of Pluto
programme.desc: The first close-up images of Pluto revealed the unimaginable secrets of this mysterious frozen world. Now, scientists investigate if Pluto is home to a warm ocean of liquid water beneath its surface, and whether this underground ocean could harbor life.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Big Bang
programme.desc: As experiments go, the Large Hadron Collider at Cern is one of the biggest. Its circular tunnel is 17 miles long, and the most expensive at a cost of six billion dollars. Presenter Brian Cox tackles the question: what exactly is it going to tell us?

programme.title: What on Earth?: Hunt for El Dorado
programme.desc: Strange images from the jungles of Colombia could lead researchers to the legendary city of El Dorado. A bright green swirling spiral appears in the seas of the Persian Gulf. A massive complex suddenly appears secretive state of Myanmar.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Mystery in the Outback
programme.desc: A giant carving of a strange creature suddenly appears in the Australian Outback. Mysterious bright green lights illuminate the seas around Thailand. Top secret activity is discovered at Iran's nuclear facility.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Finding Sodom
programme.desc: Mike Barratt, an astronaut with NASA, explains the strange rings on the world's oldest lake that were photographed from the International Space Station. Since then, more rings have been seen and they continue to baffle scientists.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Finding King Arthur
programme.desc: An abandoned megacity in a remote jungle might be the home of an ancient treasure and a dark secret. When a mysterious circular stone structure is discovered in Scotland, experts investigate whether it's the fabled Round Table of King Arthur.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Village of the Damned
programme.desc: A forbidden island points to a strange South American town that locals claim was the home of Adolf Hitler. New data from NASA satellites might reveal a sunken lost continent in the Indian Ocean. A pit of bodies suggests fears of a zombie nightmare.

programme.title: Mission Declassified: The Lost Treasure of Dutch Schultz
programme.desc: Christof joins the decades-long hunt for the buried millions of notorious gangster Dutch Schultz. Armed with rare documents and cutting-edge tech, Christof follows the fugitive mob boss's trail from Saratoga Springs, New York, to Miami, Florida.

programme.title: Mission Declassified: Escape From Alcatraz
programme.desc: Three prisoners escaped from Alcatraz in 1962. Officially, they died in the surrounding waters, but FBI files say otherwise. Christof Putzel braves those same waters to hunt down inside information before going on a manhunt to Brazil.

programme.title: Mission Declassified: The Hunt For D.B. Cooper
programme.desc: Christof jumps from a plane and digs up rare FBI files as he follows shocking new leads that take him from the Pacific Northwest to Las Vegas and Utah in his quest to find the real identity of hijacker D.B. Cooper.

programme.title: Mission Declassified: The Axeman of New Orleans
programme.desc: A century ago, New Orleans was terrorized by an axe murderer. Now Christof discovers new leads that could point to some of the earliest mafia hits. This gruesome crime spree takes him from the Big Easy to Sicily and Los Angeles.

programme.title: Mission Declassified: Decoding America's UFO Secrets
programme.desc: Christof heads to the woods of the UK and snowy fields of Canada to determine what the truth is behind UFO sightings. He soon uncovers a much bigger story behind what secrets the government is hiding.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Missing: The Men Who Beat Alcatraz
programme.desc: In 1962, three convicts attempt the impossible and escape from Alcatraz prison. Officials believe the men drowned, but a new scientific experiment suggests they made it to shore.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Missing: Flight of Terror
programme.desc: In 2009, an Air France flight going missing and investigators discover this tragedy could happen again. After a huge area of Siberian forest is destroyed, investigators race to find the culprit. New evidence might finally solve this century-old mystery.

programme.title: Dallas SWAT
programme.desc: Steve Claggett and Rich Emberlin are called out to help execute an arrest warrant on a gang of suspected crack-cocaine dealers barricaded inside a house; the SWAT team's tactical skills are put to the test as they overcome the barriers-to-entry.

programme.title: Dallas SWAT
programme.desc: A car used to rob a large cache of assault rifles is found parked outside a house in a Dallas suburb; a sniper must call out a possibly armed and dangerous suspect from his home; but when a young boy comes out, all strategies must be changed.

programme.title: American Justice: Crime Family
programme.desc: A profile of infamous mob boss Vito Genovese and how he built the most ruthless and powerful crime family in the nation. Includes interviews with Genovese's godson, FBI agents and prosecutors.

programme.title: American Justice: Framed
programme.desc: The shocking story of Clarence Brandley, an innocent man convicted of murder.

programme.title: Nightwatch: Always Remain Calm
programme.desc: Tampa first responders have a chaotic night treating seizure and overdose patients; the ROC Squad Task Force tracks down suspected armed robbers in a high-speed chase.

programme.title: Nightwatch: Saints and Sinners
programme.desc: Like any dad, Titus wants the best for his son. As an EMT, he sees just how dire life can get. Meanwhile, police officers continue to work desperately to get guns off the street and make the city a safer place to live.

programme.title: Fugitive Chronicles: Danny Ray Horning
programme.desc: Horning goes to the one place he thinks he'll never be found, the Grand Canyon. Living off the land, he evades capture in the longest and largest manhunt in Arizona state history.

programme.title: Fugitive Chronicles: Darli
programme.desc: An incredible international manhunt ensues when a player in Miami's drug world goes on the lam.

programme.title: Fugitive Chronicles: Pritchert
programme.desc: Craig Pritchert and his girlfriend are a modern day Bonnie and Clyde. After falling in love, the two go on a bank robbery spree, and flee the country with $500,000 in cash. After being spotted in Cape Town, the FBI sends a team to take the two down.

programme.title: Female Forces: Crash Makeover
programme.desc: Betsy and Officer Julie Lardino convince Officer Tracy to undergo a head-to-toe makeover while still keeping the city safe.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Hunting Ground
programme.desc: Nicole White is in the middle of a bitter custody battle when she vanishes. Suspicion falls on an online date until her husband turns up unexpectedly with his face scratched.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Control Alt Delete
programme.desc: Maribel Ramos is a US army veteran with a complicated love life. When she arranges to meet an online date, she disappears, leaving family and friends desperate for news. Detectives are left to uncover a twisted tale of jealousy and rage.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Death of an Internet Star
programme.desc: When a young fashion designer and mother of three becomes a YouTube star with her online sewing tutorials, the money starts rolling in. But her obsessive and violent ex-boyfriend isn't prepared to let her rise to the top without him in her life.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Webcam of Lies
programme.desc: When a hopeful 12-year-old singer looks for fame online using her webcam, she gathers many admirers, and soon finds a boy who flatters her so much she falls for him. But her dreams become her worst nightmare when a shocking photo is shared online.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Fatal Crossing
programme.desc: A beautiful mom and her young daughter are found dead near train tracks under mysterious circumstances. Questions from '48 Hours' help get police to reopen the case.

programme.title: The Devil Speaks: No Remorse
programme.desc: Robin Sowders is brutally beaten in his home in Bloomington, Indiana and later dies from his injuries. When his wife turns up at the police station, the investigation turns on its head. Only a wiretap will eventually reveal the truth.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Vanished
programme.desc: So-Cal surfer and tech entrepreneur, Chris Smith, dreams of making a tidy sum of money and then surfing off into the sunset. It seems his dreams have come true, but all is not as it appears.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: The Sound of Silence
programme.desc: Gallaudet University is America's premier college for the deaf, but this haven for higher learning is turned upside down when two students are murdered in their dorm rooms. Investigators dive into campus life and reveal a serial killer in the making.

programme.title: The Devil Speaks: No Remorse
programme.desc: Robin Sowders is brutally beaten in his home in Bloomington, Indiana and later dies from his injuries. When his wife turns up at the police station, the investigation turns on its head. Only a wiretap will eventually reveal the truth.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Fatal Crossing
programme.desc: A beautiful mom and her young daughter are found dead near train tracks under mysterious circumstances. Questions from '48 Hours' help get police to reopen the case.

programme.title: The Perfect Murder: Deadly Divorce
programme.desc: A Milwaukee mother is murdered in 1981. Her sons describe a masked man with a ponytail fleeing the home. Was it her bitter cop ex-husband? Or a neighbor who claims his gun was stolen? Police make a shocking arrest, but some have doubts to this day.

programme.title: The Perfect Murder: The Honeymoon Killers
programme.desc: A Belgian honeymoon comes to a tragic end when a freak car accident leads to a tragic death. The investigation takes police down a rabbit hole of violence and deceit, culminating in an international manhunt for a calculating killer.

programme.title: The Perfect Murder: Body in the Glades
programme.desc: 42-year-old Miami mother Raquel Calderin vanishes without a trace on her way home from work in 2012. The investigation will lead detectives deep into a disturbing family picture, and the truth will haunt them for years to come.

programme.title: The Perfect Murder: Whidbey Island Mystery
programme.desc: A man found shot in head in his car starts a case that takes a decade to solve and leaves many with lingering questions.

programme.title: Dateline: Manner of Death
programme.desc: It was a mystery from day one: a young father's life cut short. How Matt Podolak died was a curious. The word poison kept coming up. Unsure if it was suicide or murder, Matt's brother embarks on a long quest for the truth.

programme.title: Dateline: Manner of Death
programme.desc: It was a mystery from day one: a young father's life cut short. How Matt Podolak died was a curious. The word poison kept coming up. Unsure if it was suicide or murder, Matt's brother embarks on a long quest for the truth.

programme.title: Dateline: The Dream House Mystery
programme.desc: A realtor lands her dream assignment, but turns up dead on the job.

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: Lurking in the Hollers
programme.desc: Family means everything to folks who live in the mountain hollers of Townsend, Tennessee. When one member of the large Griffin clan is found murdered and another goes missing, investigators begin to suspect that a family feud may have taken a deadly turn.

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: Who Killed the Music?
programme.desc: When John Tarwacki Sr. discovers the bodies of his son and daughter-in-law, the only story told at the scene is found in the snow. Boot prints reveal the path the killer took, but the search for motive will lead police in a startling direction.

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: Prints of Darkness
programme.desc: When Michael and Melisa Augustson move to little Alma, Georgia they're soon taken in by the community. But on December 14th, Michael comes home to a scene of unspeakable horror. His wife has been murdered, and only one person in the town knows why.

programme.title: Evil Twins: Double Barrel
programme.desc: An officer is murdered by identical twins Joel and Michael Stovall. The heavily armed duo soon hijacks a pickup and lead law enforcement on high-speed shootout through the Colorado mountains. The 60-mile chase finally ends with a dramatic shootout.

programme.title: Evil Twins: Mile High Monsters
programme.desc: When a young mother disappears outside Denver, an investigation leads police to the home of identical twins Daniel and David DeWild. The brothers claim to know nothing of the crime, but their pact of silence will end when one twin betrays the other.

programme.title: Warrior POV: Search and Destroy
programme.desc: In a battle known as the Nine Days in May, the troops of the US 4th Infantry Division are on a search and destroy mission in Vietnam's Central Highlands when they run headlong into a massive force of North Vietnamese soldiers on the Cambodian border.

programme.title: Warrior POV: Tet Offensive
programme.desc: During the infamous Tet Offensive of 1968, an elite band of US Special Operations troops are called in to rescue dozens of helpless civilians trapped in the border town of Chau Doc, which has been captured by an overwhelming Viet Cong invasion force.

programme.title: Warrior POV: Road to Baghdad
programme.desc: See the shot by shot firefights in the 21 day bloody battle for Baghdad from the warrior's point of view.

programme.title: Honor Flight: A Journey of Heroes
World War II in Color: Turning the Tide
programme.desc: As WWII erupted, there was a race to develop new weapons and ways to wage war. Both the Allies and the Germans were searching for something that would give them a knockout blow and bring the war to a quick end.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Overlord
programme.desc: By early 1944, Hitler faced a new threat. In the West, Allied preparations to invade northwest France were coming to a climax. It was an attack he had long been expecting. His problem was knowing when and where it would come.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Lightning War
programme.desc: Hitler's armed forces took just four weeks to conquer Poland. Their opponent was not only outnumbered both in men and weapons, but facing a new type of warfare - Lightning War or Blitzkrieg - for which it was totally unprepared.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Closing the Ring
programme.desc: By late summer 1944, the Allied forces in north-west Europe were thrusting towards the German border. Paris and Antwerp were liberated, but then supply problems brought the advance to a halt. Meanwhile, Stalin had halted his main thrust towards Berlin.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Overlord

programme.title: World War II in Color: Hitler Strikes East
programme.desc: By the autumn of 1940, Hitler's forces were supreme in Western Europe. Britain remained undefeated but the country was isolated and Hitler no longer considered it a threat. The Fuhrer was ready for his greatest gamble - Operation Barbarossa.

programme.title: Warrior POV: Road to Baghdad

programme.desc: On this special edition, learn the real story behind the most famous flying devices in history and the truth behind our most influential inventors.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Bonus Round: Vices and Vacations
programme.desc: On this special edition of America: Facts vs. Fiction, we explore the myths surrounding our favorite vices and learn the facts behind some of our favorite holidays.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Bonus Round: Discovering America
programme.desc: Explore the truth behind the men who discovered the New World and take a trip to discover the real facts behind the most famous bridge and road in America.

programme.title: Weaponology: Vertical Take-Off
programme.desc: The Vertical Take-Off aircraft are the most innovative weapons at present day.

programme.title: Weaponology: Artillery
programme.desc: Artillery is ever present on the battlefield, and always evolving to keep pace with warfare. From catapults to cannons, ballista to battleships, gunpowder to giant super guns, chart the evolution of this powerful dynasty of destruction.

programme.title: Weaponology: Bomber

programme.desc: Explore four conspiracy theories relating to the Catholic Church. See if Pope John Paul I was poisoned or if the Church knew about Nazi war criminals fleeing to South America.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: A Dream Come True
programme.desc: A couple with five children calls on the Cabin Masters to take their newly purchased camp on David Pond and turn it into a family vacation cabin that will serve as a central part of their lives for generations to come.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: A Legacy Preserved
programme.desc: The crew pay tribute to an entomologist and late matriarch of an amazing legacy in West Gardiner, Maine, by restoring two rustic cabins on her 113-acre Wakefield Wildlife Sanctuary.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Diamond in the Rough
programme.desc: After three women collectively buy a cabin they describe as 'a diamond in the rough on a pretty lot,' they are determined to prove the naysayers wrong and create the cabin of their dreams.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Golden Years Family Camp
programme.desc: After buying her parents' old summer camp in Bridgton, a mother calls on the crew to help her completely renovate the home for her parents to retire in full-time. With a $40,000 budget and an open time line, the crew transform it into a retirement space.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Reel Theatres
programme.desc: The crew salvages a movie theater, and find analog projectors, neon letters and more.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Teacherage
programme.desc: The team head to Henderson, NC, to salvage parts from an old home that used to house young female teachers. They salvage an attic ladder, doors, archways, and columns as well as the home's fire escape.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Maryland Strip Mall
programme.desc: The crew returns to Largo, MD, where they harvest items from a sporting goods store at the Boulevard at the Capital Centre. Robert and Grayson salvage the electrical system while Mike, Tay and Ted remove exterior beams for a future cantilever bench.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Blacksburg Barn
programme.desc: The dawgs head to Blacksburg, Virginia, to salvage an 1800s barn with an internal log structure. It should be an easy job, but a hurricane on the horizon means a tighter deadline to make it out before the storm arrives.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: The Dixie Dog Den
programme.desc: The Cabin Masters team helps their own Matthew Dix restore his grandfather's old shed to its former glory.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Past, Present and Future
programme.desc: A couple's Belle Island camp has a long multi-generational history within their family spanning nearly 100 years. Their camp is an ongoing focus of family life and they are now ready to make its preservation their main priority.

programme.title: Disaster Decks: The Deck Stephanie Hates

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: American Rehab: Virginia: Curved Kitchen
programme.desc: Mt. Airy was passed down to Catherine and Taylor, who are fixing it up so they can one day pass it on to their children. They are starting with the kitchen, which has an impractical narrow curved design.

programme.title: American Rehab: Virginia: Family Space
programme.desc: The main house at Mount Airy is very formal and not really suited for a family with young kids. The Tayloes take on the challenge of converting an extra bedroom into a casual family room where they can kick back and relax.

programme.title: American Rehab: Virginia: Outdoor Entertainment
programme.desc: The grounds of Mount Airy are massive, but the Tayloes don't really have a designated place to entertain outside. They want to create an outdoor cooking and dining area complete with a fire pit. But first they must pass inspection from archeologists.

programme.title: American Rehab: Virginia: Smokehouse Speakeasy
programme.desc: The smokehouse is an outbuilding constructed in 1761 that was used to preserve meat. The Tayloes want to convert this dilapidated space into a speakeasy style bar they can use for their wedding business and for entertaining.

programme.title: American Rehab: Virginia: Master Suite
programme.desc: The Tayloes have been living with the old furniture and decor since they moved in to Mt. Airy. It's time for the master bedroom and bathroom to finally feel like their own space.

programme.title: American Rehab: Virginia: Modern Man Cave
programme.desc: The counting house is an outbuilding that has become a dumping ground. Emery wants to fulfill his grandfather's vision of converting this building into the ultimate man cave complete with a seating and storage area and a functioning workshop.

programme.title: American Rehab: Virginia: Multi-Function Mudroom
programme.desc: The lower level of the west wing has warped floors and crumbling brick walls and needs major restoration. The Tayloes will turn this wasted space into a multi-functional mud room.

programme.title: American Rehab: Virginia: Wing Bed and Bath
programme.desc: The Tayloes want to turn two unused west wing rooms into a guest bedroom and bathroom that can house multiple guests.

programme.title: American Rehab: Virginia: Wing Lounge
programme.desc: On the main level of the west wing is the original laundry room where clothes were washed by hand. Despite its lack of flooring and crumbling walls, the Tayloes want to turn this space into a lounge for their guests.

programme.title: American Rehab: Virginia: Wing Kitchen
programme.desc: The Tayloes want to turn the original kitchen in the west wing into a chef's kitchen for when they host large parties. Not only do they need to rebuild a fireplace brick by brick, but they also need to blend historic aspects with modern day kitchen.

programme.title: Renovation Realities: The Grey Job
programme.desc: A grandfather needs a little more personal space in his family's home, where is close and available to help with his grandchildren but can still live his bachelor lifestyle.

programme.title: Renovation Realities: The Harvey Job
programme.desc: Randi and George Harvey love most of their home except for their master bathroom. They believe a renovation is definitely in order, but with 30-year-old 'hair babies' and falling mirrors, this project proves it's easier said than done.

programme.title: Renovation Realities: The Hillebrand Job
programme.desc: Kayli Hillebrand hates her old kitchen. She enlists the help of her best friend, Megan Langford, to tear it apart and start new. Although these two work well together, they never imagined what sort of problems they would encounter.

programme.title: Renovation Realities: The Ossorio Job
programme.desc: Carolyn Ossorio and her husband Paul hate their old, rundown master bathroom and want to make it useful again. Although this couple knows how to work together, a bloody hand and busted plumbing put their patience to the test.

programme.title: Renovation Realities: The Padula Job
programme.desc: Jill and John Padula don't feel at home in their master bathroom. A few falls off the ladder, bloody hands, and plumbing issues prove this reno is easier said than done.

programme.title: Renovation Realities: The Poole Job
programme.desc: Daniel Poole and his wife Kari feel that their master bedroom, which use to belong to Daniel's parents, could use some changes to make it fit their style. With floorboards that put up a fight and a discussion on closet space, they get underway.

programme.title: Renovation Realities: The Russell Job
programme.desc: Whitnee and Cody Russell hate their kitchen. With a useless wall blocking their view to the living room and the small counter space hindering Whitnee's ability to cook, these two are ready to take on a renovation.

programme.title: Renovation Realities: The Tatge Job
programme.desc: Evan and Melanie Tatge cannot stand their current bathroom. With a tub they never use taking up space, they both agree a renovation is in order. Due to being amateurs, they run into some problems along the way.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Dumplings & Pumpkins
programme.desc: Noah's first stop is at the North Florida Fair in Tallahassee, where he feels the burn with dead heat tacos.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Shepherd's Pie And Sunday Dinner Sundaes
programme.desc: Noah Cappe kicks things off at the Big E in West Springfield, Mass., where he 'meats up' with a deconstructed Turducken Sandwich and the award-winning country fried shepherd's pie.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Grillers in the Mist
programme.desc: Noah Cappe heads to New York for the Long Island Fun Fest and some Empire State eats. He can't resist a pizza covered in gooey penne alla vodka or a fancy Hamptons Dog, and he also tries the ultimate Italian-American combo, a Cannoli Calzone.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Souperman
programme.desc: Noah Cappe ventures to the land of cheese for the Wisconsin State Fair and is greeted with the ooey-gooey French Onion Soup'r Stick.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Charlotte, North Carolina
programme.desc: Casey Webb charges into Charlotte, North Carolina, for three takes on Southern specialties. There's a cheesy chicken classic care of Korea, a time-honored institution's signature sandwich and the biggest walking taco in all the Carolinas.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Cincinnati, OH
programme.desc: Casey Webb heads to Cincinnati to see if he can take down an enormous eight-pound, double-crusted pizza in just thirty minutes. Along the way, he encounters one beautiful cheeseburger at a 200-year-old bar and a massive tray of Cincy-style chili.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Ocean City, Maryland
programme.desc: Casey Webb heads to Ocean City, Maryland, to dive into a massive jumbo lump crab cake sandwich, make some of the area's iconic salt water taffy candies and fight to stay afloat in the Titanic Sundae Challenge.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Jersey Shore, NJ
programme.desc: Casey's drive to devour America's most delicious dishes brings him back to his roots: the Jersey Shore. He's here for an explosive sandwich, stuffed lobster and a ghost chili-infused pizza challenge.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Comforting Classics
programme.desc: There's nothing quite as comforting as a classic, down-home meal that reminds you of the good old days. For Ted Allen, it's a cinnamon roll, and for Giada De Laurentiis, it has to be pot pie.

programme.title: Thanksgiving Grubdown
programme.desc: Carla Hall discovers some Thanksgiving traditions with a twist and a cornucopia of outrageous Turkey Day treats. Gobble until you wobble on pumpkin pancakes piled high with a slice of cheesecake.

programme.desc: Jeff Mauro, Geoffrey Zakarian, Jamika Pessoa and Bobby Flay are just a few of your favorite food personalities sharing their all-time favourite ways to indulge in some cheesy goodness.

programme.desc: America's best delicatessens are serving everything from perfected tried-and-true classics to inventive new spins on old favourites. Wolfgang Puck shares the best hot smoked salmon in the country.

programme.desc: Host Sabin Lomac, a native of Maine and a lobster roll expert, is in search of the country's most decadent and delicious eats by the seaside. He heads to a bar on Long Island, NY where drinks are served beachside, and then enjoys food as boats arrive.

programme.title: Seaside Snacks and Shacks: California Dreamin and Southern Swagger
programme.desc: Lobster roll expert Sabin Lomac is searching for delicious seaside fare from all over the country. At the Old 27 Grill in Fairhope, Ala., he goes all in for the Holy Cow Burger with creamy au poivre sauce.

programme.desc: Sabin Lomac heads to Calabash, N.C., for a calabash stew with fresh seafood and a one-two punch of sausage and deep-fried corn at Waterfront Seafood Shack.

programme.title: Seaside Snacks and Shacks: Let The Good Times Roll
programme.desc: Lobster roll expert Sabin Lomac starts his hunt for delicious eats by the seaside in Traverse City, Mich., where Sparks BBQ is famous for a "sundae" with pulled pork as the ice cream, coleslaw as the topping and beef jerky as the cherry on top.

programme.title: Seaside Snacks and Shacks: Burgers, Beaches...Bananas!
programme.desc: In search of decadent eats by the seaside, Sabin Lomac heads to Lulu's a "high class dive" in Gulf Shores, for a fried green tomato pimento cheese burger and Lulu's gumbo.

programme.title: Seaside Snacks and Shacks: Michigan Favorites And California's Famous Tacos
programme.desc: Sabin Lomac starts this trip in the historic Fishtown district of Leland, Mich., where he roughs it at the Cove with their summer-fresh Campfire Whitefish and perfect Michigan cherry pie.

programme.title: Cheap Eats: Cream of the Crop
programme.desc: Ali Khan starts his day in Louisville, KY., by cutting into a towering stack of thick hot chocolate pancakes. Lunchtime in Louisville means a saucy Mata Hari hot brown.

programme.title: Cheap Eats: All Aboard In Chat-Town
programme.desc: Ali Khan is looking for the best deals in Chattanooga, starting with a glorious colossal cinnamon roll before he digs into an out-of-this-world sweet and sassy lamb burger for lunch.

programme.title: Cheap Eats: Culinary Cornhuskers
programme.desc: Ali Khan starts his Omaha food adventure with breakfast from a fast made-from-scratch joint offering a crazy good egg boat with hash browns. For lunch, Ali tips his hat to an iconic Omaha lunch with a housemade Reuben.

programme.title: Cheap Eats: Bayside Bites
programme.desc: In Baltimore, Ali Khan comes face-to-face with bacon-infused pancakes fit for 'the king', then channels his inner Neanderthal for his first taste of Maryland pit beef.

programme.title: Cheap Eats: Fillin' Up in the South
programme.desc: Ali Khan hits the ground running in Richmond, Va., at a bakery that puts a spicy twist on a traditional Southern biscuit.

programme.title: Cheap Eats: Big Sky, Big Game, Big Flavor!
programme.desc: Ali's expedition for the best deals in Bozeman, Mont., begins with farm-to-table fresh benedict and summer sausage before hunting down a made-from-scratch elk burger.

programme.title: Cheap Eats: Mountain Feast
programme.desc: Ali hits the Jackson Hole, Wyo., trail running for a delicious croque madame with mornay sauce in the morning and crosses the Snake River for a crunchy fried chicken banh mi sandwich.

programme.title: Cheap Eats: Crossroad Foodie
programme.desc: Ali paves the way in Salt Lake City with a zesty pound cake-inspired French toast, then gets wasted on a burger topped with fried guacamole. A biker bar sends him to heaven with a Utah staple, fried Mormon funeral potatoes.
